programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: The Legend of Pinkfoot/ Flossie the Mossling

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Masterclass Four

programme.desc: Dorothy accepts Lucas's marriage proposal and they wed. Blanche, Rose, and Dorothy say a tearful goodbye with Dorothy planning on moving to Atlanta. Meanwhile, Sophia makes a final decision on where she wants to live.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Here's the Kicker
programme.desc: Mike is ecstatic when Eve is picked to be her high school's first female kicker. But Vanessa feels high school football could be risky for their youngest daughter.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: War Games
programme.desc: Boyd gets sent home early from a birthday party for starting a game of 'war,' Ryan insists Mike stop exposing his son to action movies and video games.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Rediscover America
programme.desc: The long-time friendship between Mike and Ed is challenged when Ed's pushy girlfriend, Wendi, thinks Outdoor Man store owner Ed and not Mike should be the face of the sporting goods store.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Sink Hole
programme.desc: When Mike and Boyd narrowly miss a sinkhole on the interstate, Boyd becomes petrified of leaving the house. Matters get more complicated when Mike and Ryan have different opinions on how best to ease Boyd's fears.

programme.title: The Middle: Thanksgiving II
programme.desc: Mike invites his father, who has a broken hip, and his brother, who lives in a tent, to Thanksgiving dinner. Brick is excited that Bob's girlfriend, the local librarian, is also coming to dinner. Sue tries to start a mother-daughter tradition.

programme.title: The Middle: A Simple Christmas
programme.desc: The Heck's count down the 12 days of Christmas with Frankie's parents when they come to town to spend the holidays.

programme.title: The Middle: Taking Back the House
programme.desc: After years of being at their kids' beck-and-call and never having time for themselves, Frankie and Mike decide to take charge of their lives and regain control of their household. Axl, Sue and Brick don't plan on going down without a fight.

programme.title: The Middle: The Big Chill
programme.desc: Mike freezes Frankie out because he can't fathom how she inadvertently paid $200 for a small bottle of eye cream that she thought was priced at $20. Meanwhile, Axl's fathering techniques are put to the test.

programme.title: Reba: Sweet Child O'Mine
programme.desc: Barbra Jean panics a pregnant Cheyenne by remarking that her baby may turn out to be a mini-Kyra. Reba decides its time she told Cheyenne that she was the mean sister, not Kyra.

programme.title: Reba: Locked and Loaded
programme.desc: Kyra has been secretly taping Van and posting the video on YouTube.com for the entire world to see and mock. Reba advises Brock to make a grand romantic gesture to save his marriage to Barbra Jean.

programme.title: Reba: As We Forgive Those...
programme.desc: Barbra Jean convinces a reluctant Reba to coax the truth out of Kelly. Barbra Jean suspects that Kelly was brought in by management to be her successor. Meanwhile, Cheyenne and Van break some bad news to Brock.

programme.title: Reba: Bullets Over Brock
programme.desc: Reba learns that Brock has been secretly living in the garage for several days so he can spend time apart from Barbra Jean, who thinks he is on a business trip. Brock confesses that he doesn't know how to mend things with his wife.

programme.title: South Park: Eat, Pray, Queef
programme.desc: Someone plays an April Fool's joke on the boys and it doesn't go over well. Meanwhile, Terrance and Phillip are disgusted by their new co-stars' antics.

programme.title: South Park: Freemium Isn't Free
programme.desc: Stan is addicted to the new Terrance and Phillip mobile game.

programme.title: South Park: Unfulfilled

programme.title: South Park: Bike Parade
programme.desc: The boys' chance of winning the Bike Parade is in jeopardy when Kenny quits.

programme.title: South Park: Going Native

programme.title: South Park: Margaritaville
programme.desc: Randy steps forward with a solution to fix the desperate state of the economy. Stan and Kyle find another solution and save the townspeople's finances.

programme.title: South Park: Crippled Summer
programme.desc: Jimmy and Timmy head off to summer camp with all their handi-capable friends. When one of the camp counsellors, Towelie, falls off the wagon, the boys stage an intervention.

programme.title: South Park: Pee

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita

programme.title: South Park: Fat Camp

programme.desc: The doctors of Grey Sloan Memorial are hit with a barrage of spooky patients, which affects their own plans and puts one doctor's well-being in jeopardy. Meanwhile, Derek collaborates with Ben on a new surgical technique.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Two Against One

programme.title: The Closer: Relative Matters
programme.desc: The murder of a man under FBI surveillance puts the federal agents in hot water with the L.A.P.D.

programme.title: The Closer: Road Block
programme.desc: The Major Crimes Division investigates the hit-and-run murder of a young girl on a bike.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Off the Wagon
programme.desc: Andy and Mike delve into the mysterious overdose of a young Hollywood star and the trail of emotional destruction he left in his wake. Meanwhile, Rusty finally comes to a conclusion about how to handle the pregnancy of his biological mother.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Family Law
programme.desc: When a jogger takes a nasty fall down the steps of L.A.'s storied Greek Theatre, Major Crimes finds itself investigating a divorce attorney with a lot of angry clients, and Lt. Tao goes undercover in the world of college age hookers.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Dead Zone
programme.desc: While investigating a murder that has personal implications for Sanchez, the squad uncovers a much larger criminal operation. Meanwhile, Buzz comes face to face with someone that may have been present at his father's murder.

programme.title: Major Crimes: White Lies
programme.desc: In attempting to clear up lose ends from their investigation of a gang of White Supremacists, Major Crimes detectives audit the trial of serial killer Dwight Darnell, and end up facing their most deadly case ever.

programme.title: Major Crimes: White Lies

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Bombs and Betrayal
programme.desc: Tucson, Arizona society is blown away when a car bomb explodes outside of an exclusive country club, but when the case goes cold, will investigators be able to find their suspect?

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Cashed Out
programme.desc: When a mother of six is viciously slain in her Sarasota home, police wonder if her wealthy ex-husband might have been involved in the crime?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.desc: After a young mom is found brutally murdered in her home, investigators find startling clues on her cell phone that could lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Church Lady
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery in a small town church sends investigators on a search for a killer.

programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Black Hole

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Innocence and the Intern
programme.desc: An elderly white widow is brutally murdered in Greenwood, S.C., and Edward Lee Elmore, an African American handyman, is quickly found guilty and sentenced to death. A tenacious legal intern comes across the case and tries to save him.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Cruel and Unusual: Botched Executions
programme.desc: Lethal injection has experienced a series of botched executions in several states including Ohio, Arizona, and Oklahoma.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Boy's Story
programme.desc: A money order salesman is brutally murdered and two teenage brothers and their best friend are arrested. They spend almost four decades behind bars, until a journalist takes notice of the case and uncovers evidence of the men’s innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: After seventeen years on death row for a mass murder at Chuck E. Cheese's restaurant in Aurora, Nathan Dunlap's fate resides in the hands of one man, Governor John Hickenlooper.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: A Prison of His Own
programme.desc: Nick Yarris's uncanny knowledge of a gruesome kidnapping and murder makes him a prime suspect and eventually lands him on death row. Twenty years later new evidence emerges.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Rough Justice in the Big Easy
programme.desc: A businessman is shot dead during a mugging in New Orleans. Cops pursue a criminal named John Thompson and secure his conviction on the charges. Two successful lawyers agree to represent him and soon discover prosecutors weren't playing by the rules.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Good, the Bad, and the Abandoned
programme.desc: The world's abandoned structures hold new evidence about the lives and deeds of history's greatest heroes and villains, and using the latest discoveries at these mysterious sites, experts count down the ten most significant.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: City of Gold
programme.desc: Josh treks the stone-paved Inca Trail, ascending 20,000 feet through the Andes and into the Peruvian Amazon in search of the undiscovered City of Gold. His road to riches takes a detour to the legendary ruins of Machu Picchu.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Holy Land Mystery
programme.desc: Josh Gates uses cutting-edge technology in the Holy Land to restore Dead Sea Scroll fragments with the archeologist who found them.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Jordanian Treasures
programme.desc: Josh Gates follows new leads to the Jordanian desert in search of an ancient treasure after finding riddles etched into the Dead Sea Scrolls.

programme.title: Expedition X: Into the Alien Ocean
programme.desc: Jess and Phil's investigation into the phenomenon of unidentified submerged objects off the coast of Catalina Island intensifies after the discovery of an extraterrestrial underwater base between the island and the mainland.

programme.title: Curse of Akakor: The Missing Explorers
programme.desc: A team of investigators travels to the Amazon to search for three missing explorers who disappeared while looking for the lost city of Akakor. Their search uncovers disturbing rumors of murder.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Buried Beneath Jerusalem
programme.desc: Lost for centuries, scholars believe the Ark of the Covenant never left Jerusalem and remains buried beneath this ancient city. Now, a pioneering team of archaeologists is on a quest to unearth the most famous and treasured artifact in human history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Jordanian Treasures
programme.desc: Josh Gates follows new leads to the Jordanian desert in search of an ancient treasure after finding riddles etched into the Dead Sea Scrolls.

programme.title: Expedition X: Into the Alien Ocean
programme.desc: Jess and Phil's investigation into the phenomenon of unidentified submerged objects off the coast of Catalina Island intensifies after the discovery of an extraterrestrial underwater base between the island and the mainland.

programme.title: Curse of Akakor: The Missing Explorers
programme.desc: A team of investigators travels to the Amazon to search for three missing explorers who disappeared while looking for the lost city of Akakor. Their search uncovers disturbing rumors of murder.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Buried Beneath Jerusalem
programme.desc: Lost for centuries, scholars believe the Ark of the Covenant never left Jerusalem and remains buried beneath this ancient city. Now, a pioneering team of archaeologists is on a quest to unearth the most famous and treasured artifact in human history.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets at the Palace
programme.desc: We reveal the centuries-old secrets and mysteries of one of the most remarkable examples of Victorian engineering. Follow the cutting-edge technology that built the Palace of Westminster, and find how it paved the way for today's skyscrapers.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mayan City of Blood
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, the lost city of Chichen Itza contains ancient secrets of a mysterious civilization. Follow the scientists working to find how the city of Chichen Itza was built, and how the bloody rite of human sacrifice shaped the city.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Great Wall
programme.desc: The Great Wall of China is the biggest man-made structure on the planet and one of its biggest mysteries. Follow the scientific mission to reveal the ancient secrets of one of history's greatest empires.

programme.title: Unearthed: House of Holy Relics
programme.desc: A medieval engineering marvel might be the home to the remains of the Bible's Three Magi, and we follow the scientists and experts who are delving deep into the mysteries of this incredible religious site.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dark Secrets of the Pyramid
programme.desc: New evidence could help solve some of the Great Pyramid's greatest mysteries. Follow the investigation into how it was built, revealing the truth behind its hidden tombs and deepest secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Summit of the Gods
programme.desc: Go inside the Acropolis, an ancient engineering marvel that has stood above the city of Athens for thousands of years. Follow the scientists working to reveal its hidden mysteries: how it was built, what it looked like, and why it's still standing today.

programme.title: Unearthed: Viking City of the Dead
programme.desc: When a mysterious Viking fortress lost underground for over a thousand years is discovered, experts investigate its buried treasures to reveal what caused the end of this fearsome civilization.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hidden City of the Incas
programme.desc: The lost city of Machu Picchu is one of the greatest mysteries in archaeology. Scientists do not know why this city in the clouds was built, but investigations into secret Inca codes and deformed skeletons might finally reveal its ultimate mystery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Statue of Liberty: The New Secrets
programme.desc: The Statue of Liberty is one of the most iconic sights in the world, yet there are still secrets to be found and mysteries to be solved. Historians, archaeologists and engineers embark on a quest to unravel the inspiration behind her curious design.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Stone Age
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal secrets and ritual of the people who build the world's largest stone circle.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Pyramids of the Americas
programme.desc: At an ancient city lost in the desert for 5,000 years, experts uncover evidence of human sacrifice and strange rituals. New discoveries reveal that the people who lived here might have been the first civilization of the Americas.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: According to legend, the ancient Roman city of Hierapolis hides a secret portal to the underworld beneath its streets.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Honey I Torched the Homestead
programme.desc: Fire is a constant threat for this Oregon homestead. Livestock should be meat, but here they are family pets. The Raneys must teach a hungry family to working together before it’s too late.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Krystal's Journey

programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri send inexpensive ingredients to their favourite chefs, who have to make budget-conscious high-end dinners and family meals in their own kitchens. Guy and Hunter play Flavortown's classic budget games to make things more challenging.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Cheesiest
programme.desc: Four cheese experts create their signature dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All-Star Budget
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites four superstar chefs to duke it out in a budget battle. These culinary celebrities get hit with budget after budget, in battle after battle, testing their skill of making a dollar stretch all competition long.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy Cooks the Games: Salute the Troops
programme.desc: Hunter Fieri puts his dad, Guy, through Triple G boot camp when a few guests drop in to pay the Fieris a visit and play along with action-packed Salute the Troops games. In round one, Guy chooses a teammate to make an American comfort classic with him.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Wicked Aisle Games
programme.desc: A flip of a coin determines whether the chefs can shop the odd or even aisles while making their sandwich and side. In the final round the chefs must make their steakhouse dinner using one ingredient per aisle.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: One-Time Aisle Games
programme.desc: In Flavortown, chefs usually have free reign of the entire market – but tonight, that's all changing when Guy has the chefs cooking meals all night long… but can only shop each aisle ONCE.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Starry Movie Night

programme.title: Chopped: I'm Your Huckleberry

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Iconic Haunts
programme.desc: We explore the mysteries and legends surrounding seven spine tingling sites. Gathering a team of ghost hunters, psychic mediums and historians we reveal why these paranormal hotspots deserve their reputation as the most terrifying places in America.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Dark Encounters
programme.desc: Dine with ghosts then party with the paranormal at a haunted nightclub. Head underground in Portland where unsuspecting folks were held captive and then hit up a haunted mansion and tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: In this hour of Most Terrifying Places in America, we keep crisscrossing the country to tour even more paranormal hotspots. We visit a castle outside of Seattle that is haunted by a suicidal monk, and an early American Inn near Boston.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Deadly Destinations
programme.desc: In this instalment of the Most Terrifying Place in America, we visit the deepest, darkest, haunted spots our country has to offer. We explore a bar in Chicago that contains forces so dark it causes visitors to turn horribly violent.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Haunted Hot Spots
programme.desc: In this hour of the Most Terrifying Place in America, we're touring more of the spookiest spots in the country! We visit a defunct amusement park that delivers a unique 'thrill', and a residence so haunted the owner rarely sleeps there!

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: History of Horror
programme.desc: In this hour, continue the search for places that'll make you scream. Stop by an old prison where ghosts of the country's worst violent offenders roam, and a Chicago home that inspired the legend of the Devil Baby.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Tour of Fright
programme.desc: Visit an Illinois cemetery and a theater in Cincinnati that was built over a mass grave.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Devil's Playground
programme.desc: From a Nevada motel centered around clowns and haunted by a 1911 tragedy to a Maine movie theater where the horror lurks in the aisles and not on the screen, we explore scary attractions across the nation.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Cursed Towns
programme.desc: From a Vermont bridge where a jilted teenage girl leaped to her death, to a Tennessee intersection that was a the site of a deadly shoot out, we venture into towns across America haunted by the transgressions of the past.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Up, Up and Away
programme.desc: An original Superman costume catches Rick and Corey's attention. Rick wants to fetch a good price for a retro computer, while Corey determines the value of two vintage music posters. Chumlee tries to get a good deal for a 1980s Rhodes piano.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Balloon Payments
programme.desc: Rick may cross the line when he calls in a surprise expert for an appraisal on a Ronald McDonald balloon inflator. Chum pursues an antique RCA inkwell, while Corey sets his sights on a vintage spear.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Samurai
programme.desc: Three Japanese samurai swords have Chum trying to cut a great deal. Corey pursues a Steiff donkey pull toy, while Rick looks over a British WWII propaganda poster and some significant thank-you letters.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Fully Vested
programme.desc: A pretty pair of 18th century breechloading pistols mosey into the shop. A seller pops by with a paperweight by renowned glass artist, Paul Stankard. A custom, harmonica-holding vest that was made for Blues Traveler's front man, John Popper, stuns Chum.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Killer Cap
programme.desc: A top hat and pistol said to have once belonged to a Jack the Ripper suspect have Rick greatly intrigued. Corey is set on obtaining a 1920s time clock. Rick and Chum must decide on the purchase of a slew of celebrity signatures and the rights to a game.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn of the Seas
programme.desc: Rick explores a big deal with Captain Cook's sea map, while Chumlee haggles for a prop from Saturday Night Live, and Corey wrestles to win an autographed piece of WWE star Roddy Piper's merchandise. Then, Rick calls Rick Dale to check out an antique bike.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Watches, Waistcoats and Wizards

programme.title: Bunk'd: Cramped Champions
programme.desc: The pool at Camp Champion floods the grounds. Barb and her campers are left camp-less.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Plays of Our Lives

programme.title: Jessie: Why Do Foils Fall in Love?

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Dump-A-Rooney

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Move-A-Rooney

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Austin and Alias

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Princesses and Prizes

programme.title: Sofia the First: The Secret Library: The Tale of the Noble Knight

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Charles in Charge
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his wife go away on vacation leaving the staff the man the clinic.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Baby, It's Cold Outside
programme.desc: A Great Dane is adopted.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pigs in a Blanket
programme.desc: Cold temperatures present the staff with challenges keeping the animals warm.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: E-I-E-I-Pol
programme.desc: Spring showers bring May flowers and a rather painful situation for one unlucky patient.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Alpacalypse
programme.desc: Dr. Pol hits the road to House Farms to handle an emergency calving, where a bone has cracked and fallen into the pelvis of the cow, blocking the calf’s way out.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pup-Pup-Hooray!
programme.desc: From constipated canines to nasty dogfights, these pups have seen better days.

programme.title: Dog: Impossible: House Unrest
programme.desc: Matt helps three dogs who are in danger of losing their homes or their lives.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Life and Death on the Red Planet
programme.desc: Life once existed on Mars, but a series of devastating mass extinctions have made present-day life nearly impossible. The latest science shows how Martian life keeps bouncing back as it transforms from a blue watery world like Earth into a desert planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Evidence
programme.desc: The discovery of extraterrestrial life might face an impossible challenge: the physics of the universe itself. Using cutting-edge technology, experts might be on the verge of a groundbreaking find and the evidence could already be in hand.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Did the Big Bang Really Happen?
programme.desc: New discoveries are causing astronomers to question if the Big Bang really happened, and using the latest science, they investigate if it wasn't just the start of our universe but many mysterious multiverses.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Next Supernova
programme.desc: Our galaxy is full of stars ready to explode into supernovas, a stellar detonation powerful enough to destroy all life on Earth; it's an event that hasn't occurred in 400 years, and the search is on to locate which star may be next.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Gravitational Waves Revealed
programme.desc: Gravitational waves are helping scientists explore the cosmos in revolutionary, new ways, and the discoveries they make are revealing the universe's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: SpaceX and NASA: Mars and Beyond
programme.desc: How SpaceX and NASA are on a mission to revolutionize a new age of space exploration.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Gravitational Waves Revealed
programme.desc: Gravitational waves are helping scientists explore the cosmos in revolutionary, new ways, and the discoveries they make are revealing the universe's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: SpaceX and NASA: Mars and Beyond
programme.desc: How SpaceX and NASA are on a mission to revolutionize a new age of space exploration.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Next Supernova
programme.desc: Our galaxy is full of stars ready to explode into supernovas, a stellar detonation powerful enough to destroy all life on Earth; it's an event that hasn't occurred in 400 years, and the search is on to locate which star may be next.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mayan Armageddon: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence might reveal how the Mayans vanished. When scientists investigate an abandoned settlement, they discover traces of ritualistic drug binges from the ancient world. A mysterious symbol in the desert points to a sex cult of millionaires.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Ship of Hell Island
programme.desc: A ghost ship is found abandoned on a remote island that's home to one of the world's last uncontacted tribes. A strange labyrinth in Sicily might have a sinister connection to the Mafia. New evidence reveals a mysterious military compound in Russia.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Village of the Damned
programme.desc: A forbidden island points to a strange South American town that locals claim was the home of Adolf Hitler. New data from NASA satellites might reveal a sunken lost continent in the Indian Ocean. A pit of bodies suggests fears of a zombie nightmare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Did We Find Flight 370?
programme.desc: Investigators find a new clue about the missing Malaysia Airlines flight that disappeared in 2014. An astronaut spots something strange in the Sahara Desert. A mysterious orange sludge invades a remote village in Alaska.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hidden Tomb of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is found in the heartlands of Mongolia. Find out if it is the lost tomb of Genghis Khan. Bizarre rings in Spain could lead to the lost city of Atlantis and a huge floating island is on a collision course with New Zealand.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Tombs of the Gold Kingdom
programme.desc: Strange satellite images taken above the Nile Valley could point investigators to long-lost relics buried in an unexplored city of the dead. What they find could reveal new secrets of Kush, a once-mighty kingdom of untold gold and treasure.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Cave to Hell
programme.desc: When a sinister cave is discovered in a remote corner of Iceland, experts uncover a secret underworld tunneling to unknown depths, and using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if this strange place could hold secrets of alien worlds.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Ice Zombies
programme.desc: A zombie reindeer haunts the mountains of Norway. Strange circles appear in the sand by a secret US military base. A gigantic streak in the Arctic points towards alien life. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Valhalla
programme.desc: When experts investigate an ancient network of tunnels rumored to be the hiding place of lost royal treasure, they find evidence of human sacrifice for the Viking god Odin. An abandoned fortress in Siberia might shed new light on Genghis Khan.

programme.title: What on Earth?: America's Swamp Castle
programme.desc: Satellite images capture bizarre structures in the remote and inhospitable swamplands of Louisiana. Experts investigate a forgotten war-torn fortress with a mysterious connection to the sinking ruins of a classified military installation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters of Diamond Desert
programme.desc: An abandoned ghost town in a remote desert with a dark past. When a strange facility is spotted in Russia, experts investigate if it's hiding evidence of alien life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ruins of Cannibal City
programme.desc: When an extreme drought hits Spain, the ruins of a long-lost civilization suddenly emerge, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate evidence of ancient cannibalism.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Good, the Bad, and the Abandoned
programme.desc: The world's abandoned structures hold new evidence about the lives and deeds of history's greatest heroes and villains, and using the latest discoveries at these mysterious sites, experts count down the ten most significant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The World's Strangest Disaster Zones
programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: A young mother is strangled to death in her bedroom while her young son sleeps. As Detective Fil Waters digs into the mystery, he soon learns the victim's own mother was murdered twenty-five years earlier.

programme.title: Homicide City: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: When a hard-working, pregnant mother vanishes, detectives stumble on a love-triangle that may explain the secrets behind her death.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Ring
programme.desc: In 1987, Pat Postiglione is tasked with solving his first homicide: a young mother strangled to death inside her apartment. Without any viable suspects, Pat faces the daunting task of interviewing his only witness: the victim's 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Footprints in the Snow
programme.desc: The community in Bozeman, Montana, is rocked when officers find Lauren DeWise deceased and her roommate, Ashley Van Hemert, critically injured. As police search for clues, they realize that they must dive deep into Lauren's life to find her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: What's in the Backpack?
programme.desc: Robert Sharp is a retired professor living in Ann Arbor, Michigan, and the last person, anyone would expect to be murdered. But when he turns up brutally stabbed and burned, Robert's final moments make police wonder who could have done this and why.

programme.title: See No Evil: Last Night Apart
programme.desc: A night of celebration ends in horror when 29-year-old Adrianne Robert is found dead by her roommate. Police retrace Adrianne's footsteps and discover the club she visited is equipped with security cameras.

programme.title: See No Evil: Back to Reality
programme.desc: In Buena Park, California, a suitcase containing a mutilated body is discovered in a dumpster. The victim is identified as Jasmine Fiore, a 28-year-old model who has been reported missing. Police turn to surveillance video, hoping to identify her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: What's in the Backpack?
programme.desc: Robert Sharp is a retired professor living in Ann Arbor, Michigan, and the last person, anyone would expect to be murdered. But when he turns up brutally stabbed and burned, Robert's final moments make police wonder who could have done this and why.

programme.title: See No Evil: Last Night Apart
programme.desc: A night of celebration ends in horror when 29-year-old Adrianne Robert is found dead by her roommate. Police retrace Adrianne's footsteps and discover the club she visited is equipped with security cameras.

programme.title: See No Evil: No Good Deed
programme.desc: On September 28th 2014, Diane Cunningham is bludgeoned to death in her bedroom. The only clues are receipts from Walmart, a ferry crossing, and a casino. Security footage reveals a prime suspect with a motive, but not everything is quite as it seems.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: I Did It
programme.desc: Michelle Kinney is found murdered in her apartment in Dubuque, Iowa. Her neighbours are puzzled as she had no enemies. Local detectives unveil a haunting truth, leading to a shocking confession from an unlikely murderer.

programme.title: Evil In-Law: Hidden Evil
programme.desc: After years in foster care, Shannon Stafford longs for love and a family. When she meets Nathan Mitchell and his parents she thinks her search is over. Soon after they marry Nathan she learns that her new "loving family" has no love for her at all.

programme.title: Evil In-Law: Love's Fury
programme.desc: Everyone is surprised when Shawna Smith marries Ryan Sorenson, a young man she always considered to be just a friend. But they are shocked when Ryan shows up in Shawna's hometown armed with two handguns and deadly intentions.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Hitmom
programme.desc: When Sueanne Hobson weds a widower with a son, life seems perfect. But looks can be deceiving. Behind closed doors, Sueanne's relationship with her stepson is in turmoil. Before long, she decides the only solution is to make him disappear forever.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: She Can't Hide
programme.desc: Beautiful Elisa Redelsberger appears eager to start a new life when she meets softhearted lawyer and devoted father, Larry McNabney. But few suspect the depth of evil behind Elisa's façade until she pulls off the ultimate disappearing act.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Old River Road
programme.desc: A hit-and-run accident looks suspiciously like murder after police discover evidence of blunt force trauma and interview two sisters who can't keep a secret.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: A Song for Sarra
programme.desc: A family suffers one tragedy after another as a sister's murder and a mother's crusade for justice combine to drive another sister into a homicidal rage.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Born to Sin
programme.desc: Adopted twins Peter and Michael Versluys are raised in a loving home. As time goes by, however, the boys reveal their inner dark side and their lives become full of failure and deceit. Ultimately, their twisted bond exposes the evil that lies within.

programme.title: Cold Hearted: Twisted Fate
programme.desc: On March 1, 1975, firefighters discover the naked, burned body of Sherry Gibson in an abandoned farmhouse. After a chilling confession, officials believe the case is finally closed until they receive a shocking revelation 26 years later.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sugar Land: Life or Death
programme.desc: A Texas man targeted by a hit man fights for the life of the person who ordered the murder; his son.

programme.title: Home Alone: Banking on Fear
programme.desc: Valerie and Matthew Yussman have their worlds turned upside down when masked intruders break into their home. But this is no normal robbery -- these professional criminals want $1 million and they will use a bomb to ensure they get it.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Roadkill
programme.desc: A single mother and her daughter are delighted when a single dad and his two daughters move in next door. They become fast friends until molestation charges send their relationship spiralling into anger, accusation, and eventually multiple bloody deaths.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Murder Calling
programme.desc: When firefighters are called to a blazing truck, what they find in the house pales in comparison the bullet-ridden bodies of Robert and Dorothy Pape. And the heat turns up when police realize the extinguished truck belongs to someone else.

programme.title: Broken Trust: In-Law, Outlaw
programme.desc: A California real estate agent gives in to his wife's wish that her mother moves in with the couple, and their kids. But what begins as a compassionate gesture turns into a bitter war of wills between husband, wife and mother-in-law leading to bloodshed.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: The Boston Bandits
programme.desc: Up against an impenetrable code of silence in one of Boston's toughest neighbourhoods, a special FBI Task Force faces one of its toughest challenges yet, taking down a crew of professional robbers who've proven they're willing to kill.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Sadistic Mastermind
programme.desc: A sadistic criminal mastermind forces his victims to make a cruel choice: rob a bank or watch their family die. The FBI will need to take extraordinary measures to bringing this villain down before a chilling prophecy is fulfilled.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Terrorist in Texas
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force in Dallas, TX goes undercover to stop a homegrown terrorist from killing thousands of Americans. To neutralize this violent jihadist, the FBI will have to build a weapon of mass destruction of its own design.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Heroes
programme.desc: Four stories of heroism; A golden statue for Marines shooting a battle; The medal of honor for a daring train robbery; A General's plans that led the U.S. into WWII; and a piece of paper that spells death for Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Four different stories that of events that happened against all odds.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Pilgrims and Witches
programme.desc: The roots of America can be traced to the first settlers that came there. Learn that the Pilgrim 'Thanksgiving' was about fasting and the only 'witchcraft' in Salem was done by a group of young girls.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Against All Odds

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Catching Crazy
programme.desc: A cop-shooting fugitive terrorizes banks in South Jersey. To smoke him out, the FBI teams with a local detective and an ex-cop informant. Even with the perfect trap, this crazy criminal isn't about to go down without a fight.

programme.title: American Titans: Edison vs. Tesla
programme.desc: In the late 1800's a new life-changing electrical industry emerges with the two greatest minds of the day, Thomas Edison and Nikola Tesla, backing opposing positions on how the multi-million dollar industry will transmit power for the next century.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: American Titans: Hearst vs. Pulitzer
programme.desc: In the late 1890s when William Randolph Hearst challenges the king of newspaper publishing Joseph Pulitzer in a high stakes circulation war, they change publishing forever by stopping at nothing to gain the upper hand.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Deacon Jim Miller: The Pious Assassin
programme.desc: His neighbours saw a devout family man. The last thing his victims saw was a shotgun aimed at their heads. If there's an outlaw who was born to kill its Deacon Jim Miller, the Bible-thumping psycho-killer.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Seth Bullock: Sheriff of Deadwood
programme.desc: In Deadwood, a mining camp swirling with violence and vice, Seth Bullock is the only stabilizing force standing in the way of utter chaos.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Ventilation Blues
programme.desc: Mike tackles a recently renovated home where nothing is leveling out. The problems start with the HVAC, which doesn't heat or cool and sounds like a jet engine every time it's on.

programme.desc: A five-year-old house needs major repairs and the builder won’t do anything to help. Mike Holmes and his team of pros step in to give the family the safe home they need and make up for the shortcomings of minimum code.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Yellow Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley falls in love with an old Victorian that still has most of its original details.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Spa Fabulous
programme.desc: After recovering from a harrowing parachuting incident, a military veteran learned to walk again, got married, started a family and is now ready to build a pool. The custom oasis includes a jumping rock, a Baja shelf and plunge spa.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Caribbean Spa
programme.desc: With three energetic kids and lots of friends, a family needs a pool to keep everyone entertained. They create a masterpiece that includes a huge deck for Dad, a Baja shelf for Mom and multiple water features.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountaintop Luxury Lagoon
programme.desc: The Leasure family's new house in the hills above Folsom, CA, comes with breathtaking lakeside views, and their big pool dreams will make it a perfect home. But rocky soil and tricky plumbing designs create a big challenge for the team.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool for a Dream Home
programme.desc: The kings create a resort in a family's backyard that includes a waterfall grotto with a slide and infinity edge. Additional elements include a splash pad and sun shelf, transforming the yard from barren to beautiful.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Tuscan Wonderwall
programme.desc: The Pool Kings are faced with a dilapidated 1980s-style pool and a family that wants a beautiful yard where they can cook outside. They rip out the old pool and build a Tuscan beauty with multiple overflows and glass detail work.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool
programme.desc: Vic and Yukari had to leave their beloved pool behind when they moved into a California community. Brian and Paul must create an epic pool in the couple's new, small space, and the design includes an exposed acrylic wall holding back water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Ranch Pool Resort
programme.desc: Three generations living together on a family ranch in Austin, Texas, are ready to upgrade their old, outdated pool with a large sun shelf, a spa and a waterfall with jumping rocks.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Georgia Peach Pool Paradise
programme.desc: The Parrish family has saved their whole lives to build a tropical pool paradise in the heart of Georgia. But not everything is peachy on this build when hard soil and a complicated lazy river design present major challenges for the team.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Modern Mountain Pool
programme.desc: A family enhances their spectacular mountain view with a breathtaking oversized pool featuring an infinity edge. An outdoor kitchen and firepit complete the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Slidin' Into Home
programme.desc: A Texas family returns to their home state of North Carolina and wants to add a pool to their 70-acre property. The kings design a pool packed with fun features including a custom slide, a waterfall and an outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Whole Hog
programme.desc: Michael Symon smokes a whole hog for a juicy pulled pork sandwich in Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pizza Party
programme.desc: On the fairground, Noah Cappe discovers some amazing pizzas in Georgia and Florida State.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Nacho, Nacho Man
programme.desc: Noah Cappe tries some of the wackiest and wildest nacho combinations on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ham-let
programme.desc: Noah heads to San Diego and hams it up at the Balboa Park December Nights festival. The day starts off right with a breakfast Belgian waffle called the "Ham I Am."

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheese Please!
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is back for seconds of his seven favourite melty, ooey-gooey carnival treats. From the savoury truffled grilled cheese at the St. Paul Winter Carnival.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fries in Disguise
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Volusia County Fair in Florida, where two carnival classics get a makeover for the cheesy tater corndog and the black forest funnel cake.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Fully Loaded
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases fifteen of the most lovingly loaded culinary creations around the country. These delicious dishes are stacked high and stuffed with flavor. From Cadillac nachos to a stuffed whole hog porchettaà a quadruple chocolate cheesecake.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Brain Freeze
programme.desc: From seriously seismic shakes in Hawaii to super-size sundaes in New Orleans, Food Paradise gets a taste of the sweet life with some of the coolest frozen treats around.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Flame On!
programme.desc: We're firing up like an inferno and hitting a variety of dishes across the United States that have all the flame in their game! In Santa Monica, California, a burger joint is putting heat to their meat with a sauce made from guava and habanero peppers.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheese Please!

programme.title: Reba: Cheyenne's Rival
programme.desc: Reba is thrilled when she finds the perfect first home for Cheyenne and Van to buy. Meanwhile, not wanting the public to know they have separated, Barbra Jean asks Brock to pretend they are still happily married.

programme.title: Reba: She's With the Band
programme.desc: Kyra tells Reba and Brock that she is postponing college to go on tour with her band. When Reba puts her foot down and tells Kyra she won't allow her to make this mistake, Kyra moves out. Meanwhile, Cheyenne and Van can't agree on decorating the house.

programme.title: Movie: The Story of Us
programme.desc: The owner of a Romance bookstore runs into her first love, an architect who is overseeing a development that will forever change her neighbourhood. Her nostalgia for her home clashes with his desire for change, but their romantic tension may unite them.

programme.title: Movie: Country at Heart
programme.desc: A struggling singer and a Nashville songwriter team up to write a hit song. As a romance blossoms, they find that they are inspired to do more than just write lyrics, they fall in love.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Journey to the Center of Attention
programme.desc: Blanche tries to cheer up a lonely Dorothy by taking her out to her favourite bar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: An ancient family curse requires Sophia to save Dorothy by performing strange tasks.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: The full moon and festivities prompt strange happenings including Blanche's jewelry being swiped, Sophia trying to break a curse, and Dorothy and Miles sharing a passionate kiss.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose: Portrait of a Woman
programme.desc: Dorothy gives a speech at Career Day and is offered a job as a motivational trainer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Home Again, Rose
programme.desc: Rose is upset when she misses her high school's 40-year reunion due to poor health.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Home Again, Rose

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Blanche has a date and tries to dump her visiting uncle Lucas on Dorothy. Later, to get revenge, Dorothy and Lucas play a trick on Blanche by telling her they're getting married. Rose announces she plans on moving, Lucas decides to reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest

programme.title: Frasier: Selling Out

programme.title: Reba: Bullets Over Brock

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Engagement
programme.desc: Blanche announces that Harry has proposed leaving Rose worried about where she will live.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Guess Who's Coming to the Wedding?

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Competition

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Break-In
programme.desc: Terrified by a burglary, the girls explore means to protect themselves, including a dog.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Mike Advises Mandy

programme.desc: Taking care of our veterans from their home and office needs to their health care.

programme.desc: When an unexpected malpractice suit turns Callie's world upside down, her supportive father arrives and shares an interesting secret with her. Meanwhile, through flashbacks, we learn some surprising details about Callie and Arizona's marriage.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Somebody That I Used to Know
programme.desc: Ben worries that a casual conversation with Derek could potentially cause issues for Bailey, Cristina turns to Shane as tension grows with Meredith, and April’s upcoming wedding makes for an uncomfortable situation between Jackson and Stephanie.

programme.title: The Closer: Silent Partner
programme.desc: The federal lawsuit against Brenda comes to a head when another murder occurs related to Turell Baylor's death.

programme.title: The Closer: Hostile Witness
programme.desc: Brenda thinks she has finally cornered her long-time nemesis Philip Stroh when his latest client shows signs of cracking under pressure but a shocking courtroom maneuver by Brenda puts the entire case in jeopardy.

programme.title: Major Crimes: White Lies
programme.desc: Major Crimes hurtles forward towards the mysterious and elusive mastermind in the Dwight Darnell murders while Buzz and Rusty's investigation into the murder of Buzz's father comes to an unexpected end.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Heart Failure
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a woman found in the river is impeded by both a secretive PI working for a tech industry millionaire, and Deputy Chief Winnie Davis, who regards Sharon as competition for the promotion.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Cleared History
programme.desc: When Major Crimes discovers a young one-man geek squad in the middle of his Atwater living room with his throat cut, suspicions swirl around his roommate and some unwitting customers, all of whom he was blackmailing.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Quid Pro Quo
programme.desc: A case goes sideways at trial when defense attorney Linda Rothman is able to destroy Det. Amy Syke's credibility on the stand. Helping Rothman as a defense investigation is Amy's old nemesis, Mark Hickman.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Dead Drop
programme.desc: Major Crimes finds a heavy body forty feet up a tree surrounded by loose pot when Dr. Morales shows up to the crime scene with his father. Meanwhile, Julio Sanchez works to obtain legal guardianship of Mark Jarvis while Andy Flynn prepares a surprise.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Feds vs. Outlaws
programme.desc: The leader of the notorious Outlaws biker club is accused of a quadruple homicide in Fort Lauderdale. He beats the rap for the murders but is sentenced to death for the car bombing of a federal witness in New Orleans.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murdered Babysitter
programme.desc: A babysitter is found brutally murdered in Santa Ana, California, with five young children left in the home unscathed. The parents are quick to point to a local transient who had previously burglarized the house.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Homestead of Horrors
programme.desc: A nightmare in North Carolina. A couple that is terrified to hunt and a ramshackle home with exposed wires in the shower and chickens in the living room. The Raneys have never seen a homestead like this.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Methane Meltdown
programme.desc: The Raneys have a challenge on their hands as they try to restore a couple's failed homestead in Ohio. Marty's only hope is an old gas well, which if he can get working, can breathe life back into the homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Fire on the Forty
programme.desc: With added features and bonus scenes: The Raneys rally to finish the clifftop cabin on the Upper 20 after Marty and Mollee's cabin is engulfed in flames.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: On Thin Ice
programme.desc: Marty attempts a treacherous trip across a frozen river, in an effort to bring heat to the new cabin. Misty and Maciah build a pump house to secure the family's new water source on the Upper 20.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alabama Arch House
programme.desc: A young family in Alabama breaks ground on their forever home during peak hurricane season. Between the delays from flooding, waiting for their building kit to arrive and falling glass, it will take everything they have to make this dream a reality!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: An adventurous couple builds a home with self-sustaining features near the Ozark National Forest. While they both have renovation experience, building on the dangerous mountainside terrain in a location plagued by flash foods will be a challenge.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: On Thin Ice
programme.desc: Marty attempts a treacherous trip across a frozen river, in an effort to bring heat to the new cabin. Misty and Maciah build a pump house to secure the family's new water source on the Upper 20.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alabama Arch House
programme.desc: A young family in Alabama breaks ground on their forever home during peak hurricane season. Between the delays from flooding, waiting for their building kit to arrive and falling glass, it will take everything they have to make this dream a reality!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: California Cob House
programme.desc: A group of off-grid-living enthusiasts come together to build a 300-square-foot bungalow. With a variety of eco-friendly features, including a solar-powered water pump, this house is a welcome addition to the environmentally friendly community.

programme.title: Expedition X: Canyon of the Apes
programme.desc: Chasing Bigfoot's origin story, Phil and Jessica uncover a rash of recent sightings and bone-chilling new evidence in the Pacific Northwest. New leads about a frightening encounter send them into rocky, dangerous terrain along Mount St. Helens.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Driving Mr. Gates
programme.desc: Josh is off to the races with an episode of car talk with comedians Larry the Cable Guy and Gabriel Iglesias, NASCAR racer Kurt Busch and Street Outlaws Chief and Nova. Josh gets behind the wheel of a race car and learns from a professional driver.

programme.title: Rogue Earth: Hurricanes
programme.desc: In the past two decades, hurricanes along the North American coastline have grown more powerful and destructive. In 2016, Hurricane Matthew wreaks havoc across the continent, decimating parts of the Caribbean before bearing down on the Florida Coast.

programme.title: Rogue Earth: Alberta Floods
programme.desc: Using video captured by victims, archival footage and interviews with those directly impacted, witness the effects of Alberta's catastrophic flooding in June 2013, which killed five people and displaced 100,000 in 48 hours.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Grin and Bear It
programme.desc: Joe and Matt trek through the Alleghany Mountains of Pennsylvania, where Joe grew-up and first learned survival skills. Traveling in freezing rain, blocked by steep ravines, and deep in bear country, they're racing against Mother Nature to get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Waterlogged
programme.desc: Off the beaten path and waterlogged in the rainforest of Costa Rica, Matt and Joe battle torrential rains, deadly insects, and raging rapids. After missing a shot at rescue, they combine survival ingenuity with indigenous skills to get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Swamplandia
programme.desc: Stranded in a black water swamp in southern Georgia, Joe and Matt are deep in alligator territory where peat bogs, mysterious floating islands, and poisonous snakes stand in the way of getting out and finding rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Downed and Out, Part I
programme.desc: Matt and Joe start at the site of a plane crash off the shore of an uninhabited tropical island. With few resources and no sea traffic to bring rescue, they are forced to confront long-term survival and each other on the barren island.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Downed and Out, Part II
programme.desc: Marooned on a barren island under the tropical sun, Matt and Joe risk a long swim through shark-infested waters and fight for life-sustaining basics at every turn.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Coastal Catastrophe
programme.desc: Marooned on a rocky coast in the Pacific Northwest, Matt and Joe struggle to get away from powerful waves and come head to head over the question of whether to hunker down or travel deeper into one of the darkest, wettest forest in the United States.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Good Man Down

programme.title: The First 48: The Third Man/ Cash Money Killer
programme.desc: A popular New Orleans hip-hop promoter is gunned down next to his limousine. Then, A friendly night of drinking at a senior center apartment complex leaves one man dead and another wounded.

programme.title: The First 48: Life Interrupted/ Lucifer
programme.desc: In Atlanta, a young man comes home for lunch and is murdered when he catches a brazen thief in the act. Then, in Tulsa, an ongoing feud between two gang members leads to a fateful encounter.

programme.title: The First 48: Cranked

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of TP
programme.desc: Find out why so many early-season challenges happened in a mall, how the team hid the cameras, and what Sal said that became an instant classic. Plus, what the crew considers to be one of the first iconic moments of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line
programme.desc: Learn what phrase the cast and crew use to crack each other up, find out which Joker burned himself during a challenge and what has become a signature line in the show's opening.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Magic Man's Best Friend
programme.desc: Chris, Wes and Alex convince Eric to get a dog for his girlfriend. Chris reads people's minds and Eric rolls trick shots in a bowling alley.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Magic Man's Best Friend
programme.desc: Chris, Wes and Alex convince Eric to get a dog for his girlfriend. Chris reads people's minds and Eric rolls trick shots in a bowling alley.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Roadtrip to Whiskey Castle
programme.desc: The boys hit the road to visit a whiskey tasting at a castle. Road tricks and magic pit stops abound. Plus, The Great Ramsini visits the supermarket, Wes slingshots a balloon, and Alex's illusion shatters expectations.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: A Car Is Torn
programme.desc: Chris, Wes, and Alex convince Eric to finally trade in his Minivan. Plus, the boys rock some Shock Collar Magic, Wes throws axes, and we introduce The Great Ramsini.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.
