programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Summer Fun
programme.desc: Adam crashes the last day of summer by revealing that extended vacation makes you dumber, and that iconic rodent Mickey Mouse has made a mess of our copyright laws. He also unveils a surprising video game bias that's changed the way we play.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Sex
programme.desc: Adam reveals that circumcision was popularized by a bunch of masturbation-curbing 19th century prudes. Plus, he reveals why the fear of having herpes is overblown and explores why the term 'pop your cherry' is a bunch of nonsense.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nutrition
programme.desc: Adam shows why vitamin supplements don't make us any healthier, and that the 'balanced breakfast' we've been sold is anything but. Later, he reveals how most of the nutritional science the media reports on isn't science at all.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: A Loser Presents
programme.desc: The guys return to White Castle to serve up a new round of mischief, pose as bouncers at a nightclub, and offer phony horoscope readings in a mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: What Did I Eat?
programme.desc: The guys try to sell diamonds to unsuspecting couples ready to tie the knot, and pose as members of a very unwelcoming committee down at the boardwalk.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fishguise
programme.desc: At a local copy shop, Michael introduces a print-by-hand technique, and at a bait tackle shop, he unveils the latest fish fashion trends. Finally, at an office, Michael pulls a switcheroo and the new temp has no idea who's the boss.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: EggShaq
programme.desc: Michael unveils the mystery behind bowling balls and does the world’s longest spit-take. Plus, Shaquille O'Neal helps with a plan to blow one superfan's mind.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dead Man Walking?
programme.desc: While posing as a cook, Michael warms up his voice to serenade a clam out of its shell. Plus, a spirited trick leaves one man questioning the afterlife.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: I Am Ogle Thorpe
programme.desc: When Michael opens a shocking package at a warehouse, a man goes hog wild. Plus, one woman believes a curse has transformed a man right before her eyes.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Drivers 12
programme.desc: A man at a gas pump doesn't notice his car rolling away right behind him, while a bride and groom get sent to jail for DUI.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Drivers 13

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Drivers 14
programme.desc: Marvel at the man who drives his car through the front door and down the hallways of city hall. Another drunk driver is too intoxicated to order takeout, and a guy takes an expensive sports car for a test drive...and totals it.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Drivers 16
programme.desc: An over sized man tries to outrun a cop car, while a forklift operator totals an entire warehouse full of alcohol! Plus, dumb drivers crash into the same unlucky bakery.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity

programme.title: Modern Family: First Days
programme.desc: Luke and Manny have their first day of high school; Claire returns to the workforce.

programme.title: Modern Family: Larry's Wife
programme.desc: Phil seems to have found his wheelhouse in real estate with recently divorced women, but it's taking up a lot of his time. Meanwhile, Luke invites his buddies over for a high-stakes poker game in the basement.

programme.title: Modern Family: Farm Strong
programme.desc: Cameron's older, single sister, Pam, is coming for a visit, and Cam is in a panic to hide the engagement until he can delicately break the news to her, but it turns out she has news of her own. Phil and Claire decide to miss one of Luke's soccer games.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Late Show
programme.desc: Jay pulls some strings to get reservations at the new restaurant for an adult's night out. But, in each household, everyone is running late -- Gloria, as usual, is taking forever to get ready, and Claire and Phil are concerned about Luke being home alone.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Help
programme.desc: When Gloria hires a too-good-to-be-true male nanny, Jay and Manny are pretty much dead set against it. Frank is in town and feeling a bit lonely recently, so Phil and Jay take him out to help get his groove back. Mitch and Cam plan their wedding.

programme.title: Modern Family: Coal Digger
programme.desc: The whole family is invited to Jay and Gloria's for a barbecue and football. However, an earlier incident at school between Manny and Luke makes things very awkward for Gloria and Claire, and things escalate when a not-so-flattering label is uttered.

programme.title: Modern Family: Come Fly With Me
programme.desc: After some nudging, Jay begrudgingly takes Phil out to fly his new model airplane, but a manoeuvre goes awry. Meanwhile, when Gloria drops Manny off to play with Luke, she ends up volunteering to take Alex dress shopping.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Big Game
programme.desc: With a big football game coming up and a record to break, Coach Cam is intensely focused and showing no mercy even when the opposing team is playing with an unexpected disadvantage.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Old Man and the Tree
programme.desc: Jay takes Manny out to cut down their own Christmas tree, and Gloria is on edge with mom in town, but changes her tune when she sees her bonding with Claire. Then, Mitchell is forced to do last-minute shopping when they didn't get Lily the right gift.

programme.title: Movie: Fool's Gold
programme.desc: A married couple rekindle their marriage and romance on an adventure to find a treasure.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fingerlings Crossed!
programme.desc: Classic French chef Philippe Corbet is duking it out with D.C. chef George Rodrigues for the chance to knock Bobby Flay from his pedestal. Actress Diane Guerrero from "Orange Is the New Black" is in the house, along with "The Kitchen's" Geoffrey Zakarian.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: The kitchen heats up when Brooklyn-born chef Jen Biesty takes on self-taught chef Chris Lamphier. Who will beat the heat when Chopped judge Alex Guarnaschelli and The Kitchen's Katie Lee turn up the pressure.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: This Just In!
programme.desc: News anchor Don Lemon and Chef Alex Guarnaschelli have a news flash: Bobby Flay is going down! They bring in two award-winning chefs, Dieter Samijn of Bar Boulud and Patrick Schaeffer of Citi Field.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bye Bye Birdie
programme.desc: Michael Symon and Jet Tila work hard to outsmart their good friend Bobby Flay. They bring in one of his protégés, chef Rebecca Weitzman, and fine dining's finest, chef Brian Lewis, to muscle Bobby out of his kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sweet But Sour
programme.desc: It's all about dessert as competing Chicago pastry chefs Kym DeLost and Chris Teixeira put their friendship in the blast chiller and see who can satisfy Sunny Anderson and Katie Lee's sweet tooth.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Get In the Zone
programme.desc: Chopped's Alex Guarnaschelli and sports anchor Kenny Mayne have analyzed, scrutinized and teamed up to score one over Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Grin and Camembert It
programme.desc: Food Network darlings Valerie Bertinelli and Amanda Freitag join forces to turn the tables on Bobby Flay. They bring in New York City chefs Edward Brumfield and Ricardo Barreras, who are in it to win it.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: All At Stake
programme.desc: Nostalgia is in the air as "Chopped" judge Amanda Freitag and "The Chew's" Carla Hall aim to put an end to Bobby Flay's golden era. They've called in butcher Charles Bauer and top Miami chef Todd Erickson to get the job done.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Mr. B's and the Balcony
programme.desc: Robert Irvine visits Mr. B's Southern Kitchen in Tampa, Fla., and finds two siblings being torn apart by their failing restaurant. Then Robert returns to The Balcony in Larose, La. to see if the changes he made have been maintained.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Flying Aubergines
programme.desc: The dynamic duo of Food Network personalities Anne Burrell and Jet Tila team up to take down Bobby Flay. They have the tough job of choosing between pizzaiolo Tony Gemignani and England's own Robert Aikens.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Food Star Face-Off
programme.desc: "Worst Cooks in America's" Anne Burrell knows a star in the making, and legend Patti LaBelle is a star herself, so together they champion two former Food Network Star competitors, Viet Pham and Dom Tesoriero.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Armed and Dangerous
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens see plenty of violations at night, from road hunters to felons possessing firearms. Game Wardens stop wildlife crimes with anonymous tips about anglers keeping over the limit and a specially trained k-9 unit to sniff out illegal items.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Don't Mess With Texas
programme.desc: Game Wardens search for an endangered Whooping Crane. A local beauty shop owner finds an injured baby hawk. Wardens respond to a call about a nuisance alligator and suspicions of a deer poacher arise.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In the Nick of Time
programme.desc: Texas Summer has Game Wardens Chelsea and Ben rushing to a call about a capsized canoe. Game Warden Deschaaf investigates a trapped deer that leads to more questions than answers. At Canyon Lake, Game Wardens assist in the arrest of a man with a warrant.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Smuggle Showdown
programme.desc: Warden Iles sends abandoned armadillo pups to rehab, while Warden Reneau is on the hunt to find a couple suspected of illegally killing deer. Meanwhile, Wardens Gould and Hickerson are on hot pursuit to catch drug smugglers.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Mr. Bad Guy
programme.desc: In Southern Louisiana, Lt. David Nunez and Sgt. Austin Arteaga investigate a group of bird hunters on opening day of Teal Season. Later, a repeated offender is busted for taking immature crabs and a late-night deer decoy leads to a hunter in handcuffs.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Smuggle Showdown
programme.desc: Warden Iles sends abandoned armadillo pups to rehab, while Warden Reneau is on the hunt to find a couple suspected of illegally killing deer. Meanwhile, Wardens Gould and Hickerson are on hot pursuit to catch drug smugglers.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Mr. Bad Guy
programme.desc: In Southern Louisiana, Lt. David Nunez and Sgt. Austin Arteaga investigate a group of bird hunters on opening day of Teal Season. Later, a repeated offender is busted for taking immature crabs and a late-night deer decoy leads to a hunter in handcuffs.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Monster Crabber
programme.desc: Deep in the woods and bayous of Louisiana, Wildlife Agents protect the state's resources. A crab fisherman is caught stealing dozens of traps, a hunter crosses state lines with an illegal deer, and Agents rescue an injured bald eagle.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Encounters
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens relocate a large herd of pronghorn to restore populations in West Texas, investigate the killing of a protected rattlesnake, and wrangle a loose bull. Game Wardens check hunting camps to ensure no one's taking too many white-tail deer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Armed and Dangerous
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens see plenty of violations at night, from road hunters to felons possessing firearms. Game Wardens stop wildlife crimes with anonymous tips about anglers keeping over the limit and a specially trained k-9 unit to sniff out illegal items.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Fuzzy Puppy Stars
programme.desc: Star-struck Snow is a Great Pyrenees puppy who dreams of following in her movie star mom's paw prints. A pair of Border Collie pups will need to be brave if they're going to be champion herders. And a Scottish Terrier tries to win over the resident cat.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Cat Fight!
programme.desc: Penny Lane is a crazed cat that hates Laura's roommate, Lizzy, and attacks her at every opportunity.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Surfing Snakes
programme.desc: Steve and his best mate Wes set out on an adventure through the wild islands of Indonesia looking for the best surf. Both accomplished surfers, the pair encounter some of the more venomous snakes of Indonesia as well as lizards and mischievous monkeys.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Chester Zoo Goes Underwater
programme.desc: Welcome to the colourful world of some of Chester's rarest animals with this fully immersive, deep-dive special that explores the extraordinary underwater world of the zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Porcupine Blind Date
programme.desc: The zoo opens an endangered turtle species facility, while Malayan tigers Suhanna and Rimba struggle to breed, because Rimba seems disinterested. Needles the porcupine gets a new mate, and the Guar herd eagerly await the arrival of new calves.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: City Sleeker Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete is back in Texas to build a sophisticated, sleek-and-chic treehouse in the heart of Dallas. Daryl and the NTS team put treehouse engineering to the ultimate test at Washington State University, proving down-to-the-pound the power of the TAB.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tricks and Trees
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett head to Camp Oak at Ojai Valley Inn & Spa and are challenged to build an aquarium inside the trunk of an oak tree.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Escaping Death
programme.desc: When an aggressive dog is in danger of being put down, Tia heads to South Carolina to save him. A couple from Florida comes to VRC hoping to find a dog that will enjoy retired life with them. Parolee Toney Converse takes on more responsibility.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Storm on the Horizon
programme.desc: With hurricane season approaching, Tia prepares for the worst. Then, Tia uncovers a clue that may help Mariah and the twins track down a Katrina dog's owner. And Villalobos employee Rico steps up to the plate when his grandparents adopt a shy dog.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: Game Warden Eddins helps a neighbour in need. Reneau responds to a call about a baby red-tailed hawk. Game Warden Richards attempts to serve an arrest warrant. Game Warden Startz patrols solo on the Guadalupe River. Wardens monitor the Rio Grande.

programme.title: River Monsters: The Mutilator
programme.desc: A mysterious creature is tearing chunks from unsuspecting fishermen, starting with their male genitalia as they bathe or fish in the tribal waters of the Sepik River in Papua, New Guinea.

programme.title: Movie: Why Did I Get Married Too?
programme.desc: Four couples reflect on the past year of their marriages while on their annual vacation. Their holiday is interrupted when an ex-husband arrives with the intention of winning back his remarried wife.

programme.title: Movie: Boo! A Madea Halloween
programme.desc: Madea and her friends are asked to watch her great-niece on Halloween. As the night goes on they are plagued by supernatural events. Madea has to keep the teens out of trouble while fending off a number of paranormal threats like ghosts and zombies.

programme.title: Movie: Life
programme.desc: Prisoners at Mississippi's Parchman Farm reminisce about two inmates who were framed by a corrupt sheriff years ago for a murder they didn't commit. The odd duo spent 65 years together, squabbling and trying to escape their confines to no avail.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse: Six
programme.desc: Reggie's ex-girlfriend Adina tries to reach out to Reggie, and in attempt to protect him, Cam invites her over to tell her to keep out of Reggie's life. But Cam wonders if he's done the right thing.

programme.title: Twenties: Living the Dream
programme.desc: In a brave move to get Nia a role on Cocoa's Butter, Hattie is fired from the show.

programme.title: Martin: Guard Your Grill
programme.desc: After winning a charity boxing match, Martin thinks he is as good a fighter as anyone. After Tommy Hearns makes advances towards Gina, Martin challenges the boxer to a 10-round grudge match.

programme.title: Martin: Yours, Mine and Ours
programme.desc: When the small screen TV in the apartment needs replacing, Martin is enticed into buying a big-screen TV, and uses the money from Martin and Gina's combined checking account to purchase it.

programme.title: Martin: I Don't Have the Heart
programme.desc: Pam starts dating an older, wealthy man who eventually asks her to marry him.

programme.title: Martin: Crunchy Drawers
programme.desc: Martin has a dream in which he's attracted to Pam.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood: Suck My Trick
programme.desc: Kevin gets tricked into thinking that Nick dies when Kevin fails to donate his kidney to him. To offset the negative reaction, Kevin is led into making a 'big donation' to an organ donor organization.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood: Claire and Present Danger
programme.desc: Kevin flirts with a cougar that returns his attention, surprisingly.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood: When Kevin Met Salli
programme.desc: Kevin runs into Salli Richardson and invites her to join the poker game with an ulterior motive. Instead, her cocky husband, Dondre Whitfield, challenges Kevin to a joke-off. The prize: a permanent seat at the poker table.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood: Bazillion Dollar Arm
programme.desc: Duane gets Kevin to baby-sit his new client, Camilo Campaneris, a Cuban baseball pitching phenomenon. They partner in an attempt to get him a try-out with the Dodgers.

programme.title: The Parkers: Three's a Shag
programme.desc: Kim's old friend asks her to a party, but she declines, saying her crush on him is over.

programme.title: The Parkers: Kimberlale
programme.desc: After Kim unveils her new creations, they catch the attention of a boutique owner.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will's Up the Dirt Road
programme.desc: Will gets sued while trying to impress Lisa by taking pictures of celebrity homes.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will Steps Out
programme.desc: Will decides to fight fire-with-fire when he suspects that Lisa is dating another guy.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: Will and Carlton's friendship is strained by Will's on-going relationship with Lisa.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: It's a Wonderful Lie
programme.desc: Will, Lisa and Ashley get caught in lies and realize that telling the truth is easier.

programme.title: Black-ish: Auntsgiving
programme.desc: Pops' older sister, Almaviligerais, unexpectedly arrives for Thanksgiving, much to everyone's delight except Ruby, who can't stand her ex-sister-in-law.

programme.title: Black-ish: Being Bow-racial
programme.desc: Bow must address unresolved feelings about her own biracial identity when Junior brings home his first girlfriend, who happens to be white.

programme.title: Black-ish: Nothing But Nepotism
programme.desc: Bow urges Dre to use his connections and secure Zoey a fellowship, but he doesn't want his daughter relying on nepotism. When Bow finds Zoey a place at the hospital, Dre balks at the idea and successfully pulls some strings at Teen Vogue.

programme.title: Black-ish: Just Christmas, Baby
programme.desc: Zoey is college-bound, so Dre sets out to create the best family Christmas ever, even having Johan and his best friend Gigi over for the celebration. Meanwhile, Bow babysits Gigi's newborn and remembers just how difficult mothering a baby is.

programme.title: Black-ish: Their Eyes Were Watching Screens
programme.desc: When Diane stumbles onto some websites that give her more than she bargained for, Dre and Bow must take action. Concerned that the internet is corrupting their children, Dre and Bow decide to make their home an internet free-zone.

programme.title: Black-ish: Lemons
programme.desc: The nation is still reeling after the outcome of the presidential election, and tensions are particularly high at Dre's work. Much to his frustration, they haven't been able to get anything done since election night eight weeks ago.

programme.title: Black-ish: Good Dre Hunting
programme.desc: Bow convinces a begrudging Dre to try therapy, and he learns how to cope with his anger issues. Meanwhile, Johan becomes a life coach to the kids.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Name Game
programme.desc: Dre and Bow have a gender reveal party, and Dre is thrilled because it's his turn to name the baby. He decides on a culturally significant name that Bow and Ruby aren't a fan of.

programme.title: Black-ish: I'm a Survivor
programme.desc: When Dre goes back to Compton for a funeral, he is reunited with his old crew and struggles with survivor's remorse for the friends he left behind. Meanwhile, Bow becomes self-conscious when Ruby criticizes her parenting style.

programme.title: Black-ish: One Angry Man
programme.desc: Dre is forced to participate in jury duty after Junior responds to the summons that was thrown away. The case is supposed to be open and shut, but when Dre sees that the defendant is a young African American, he feels responsible to give him a fair trial.

programme.desc: Will and Carlton share a life altering experience when Will gets shot.

programme.desc: Will surprises Lisa with a marriage proposal.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will Is From Mars
programme.desc: Will and Lisa attend a group counselling session for couples and strengthen their bond.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Wedding Show (Psyche)

programme.title: Z Nation: Escape From Zona
programme.desc: Driven by Warren's dream of a Black Rainbow, Warren and Murphy must make their way back to the mainland.

programme.title: Z Nation: The Vanishing
programme.desc: Everyone at the refugee camp has vanished and the group plots where to head next.

programme.title: Z Nation: A New Mission: Keep Moving
programme.desc: Following Warren's dream, the heroes must keep moving for an entire episode, never able to stop as they cross 'The Great Pile,' a seemingly endless landscape of rubble and destruction.

programme.title: Z Nation: The Unknowns

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Color Correction
programme.desc: A single mom who loves to bake asks Jenn Todryk to turn her kitchen into a cake maker's paradise without burning up the budget. Then, Jenn helps a couple update their home to make it more user-friendly for their very active family.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Goodbye Beige
programme.desc: Jenn tackles a project for her college best friend, and with a baby on the way, the pressure is on to finish in just two weeks! Next, she works with a couple who wants to transform their dated beige home into a bright, welcoming space for entertaining.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Blended Styles
programme.desc: A couple torn between shabby chic and industrial styles asks Jenn to come up with a plan that will satisfy them both, all before their adopted baby arrives! Next, Jenn helps a busy couple who work from home update both their living and working spaces.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Midcentury Modernized
programme.desc: A young couple with a baby on the way asks Jenn to make their beautiful midcentury modern home more functional while staying true to its original 1950s style. She'll have to use some detective work to track down new fixtures that match the home's design.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Prickly Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a property overrun with cacti in Lakewood, California, but they can't see inside because tenants are still there! The duo returns to find a leaky water bed creating a huge mess that may endanger their profits.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cut and Run
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a Laguna Hills, CA, house in a cookie-cutter neighbourhood. When they arrive at the home, they find torn-up drywall and missing exterior siding, making them wonder why someone would leave the property in such a hurry.

programme.title: House Hunters: Room for Girlfriend in Chicago
programme.desc: A first-time buyer looks for a home that will convince his new girlfriend to move in with him in Chicago. He's looking for a townhouse with a garage, but finding a place with enough room to accommodate her in his budget will be a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters International: To Be Social or Secluded in Costa Rica
programme.desc: An Iowa couple with opposite personalities must decide what kind of location fits their idea of paradise in Ojochal, Costa Rica. He's looking for a slice of seclusion in the lush jungles, while she wants to lounge poolside in the company of neighbors.

programme.title: Happily Wherever: Hometown Showdown
programme.desc: A long-distance couple coming together is eager to find a new home, but they aren’t sure whose hometown to settle in. As a city girl, she wants a life in downtown Des Moines, and her country-boy fiancé loves the wide open spaces of Houston's suburbs.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Big Money Flip

programme.title: Flip or Flop: House of Hidden Horrors

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Frantic Fiasco

programme.title: Flip or Flop: No Risk, No Reward

programme.desc: A mysterious hunter guides a group of soldiers through the Siberian wilderness.

programme.title: Movie: The Wild North

programme.title: Movie: All Mine to Give
programme.desc: A brother must find homes for his five orphaned siblings on Christmas Day.

programme.title: Movie: The Trap
programme.desc: A trapper buys a young mute girl as his wife and takes her to into wild Canada.

programme.title: Bunk'd: A Tale of Two Stackers
programme.desc: Lou discovers the diary of the camp founder, Jedediah Swearengen, and learns her hero was a traitor. Destiny and Ava team up to try to snap Lou out of her funk.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Whatever Floats Your Goat Boat
programme.desc: Lou discovers that Mayor Higgins, who is up for re-election, is actually a goat! Lou decides to run against him with a sloth named Mrs. Fuzzybelly.

programme.title: Jessie: Evil Times Two
programme.desc: Jesse suspects Nanny Agatha's twin sister of trying to steal her job and catch Tony's eye. Emma has a giant zit on her nose.

programme.title: Jessie: Gotcha Day
programme.desc: The Ross Family puts Jessie in charge of decorations for a party celebrating the anniversary of Zuri's adoption. Meanwhile, Ravi finds out some surprising news about his own adoption.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Jessie: Zuri's New Old Friend
programme.desc: Jessie wants Zuri to play with real friends instead of imaginary ones, but when Zuri befriends the much older Nana Bananas who wears yellow track suits, talks to herself in the park and constantly squeaks a yellow horn, Jessie is worried.

programme.title: Jessie: A Doll's Outhouse
programme.desc: After the girls watch a scary movie, Jessie tries to help Zuri conquer her fear of dolls by confessing her own fear of porta-potties. Cameron teaches Ravi how to impress a girl, and Bertram listens to opera non-stop to win a radio contest.

programme.title: Jessie: World Wide Web of Lies
programme.desc: Jessie is bullied by a bossy nanny named Agatha at the park and ends up on her Stroller Patroller, (a website that features pictures of nannies appearing to abuse their children).

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Desserted/ The Gifted
programme.desc: Cricket treats his family to dinner, but Bill is suspicious about how he plans to pay for it. Tilly and Cricket battle to see if Bill lies about liking their Father's Day gifts.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Party Pooper
programme.desc: Lou is invited to a conference for camp directors, where she has been asked to give a speech. She allows Destiny to come with her, but soon regrets that decision.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Squatters' Fights
programme.desc: When Ava, Destiny, and Gwen discover that the Grizzly cabin has a much larger bathroom than theirs, they hatch a plan to convince the boys to switch.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: He's All That
programme.desc: When Harry tells Sydney he is moving back to Portland permanently, she struggles with the idea of having a long distance relationship.

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Slumber Years
programme.desc: Raven reminds the kids to take a break from their screens as they settle into their nightly routines, but Booker, Nia and Levi have other plans.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Bless This Tess
programme.desc: When Raven tells the kids that Tess can't keep coming and going during quarantine, Booker, Nia and Levi suggest Tess temporarily move in.

programme.title: Jessie: Kids Don't Wanna Be Shunned

programme.title: Jessie: Quitting Cold Koala
programme.desc: Luke decides that it's time to give up Kenny, his stuffed koala. He tries to spend one night without Kenny and gives him to Jessie to take care of. When Kenny is accidentally damaged overnight, Stuart performs emergency 'surgery' to put him together.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Brain-A-Rooney

programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare on Blood Mountain
programme.desc: A ghost ship thousands of miles away from where anyone expected, a bridge to nowhere in Florida's Hurricane Alley, and a haunting mountain complex with a bloody secret are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Giant Squid: The Dark Secrets
programme.desc: The ocean's darkest depths are home to mysterious creatures, but none more terrifying than the giant squid. Now experts use new technology to make shocking discoveries that might reveal the secrets of this fearsome monster.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Devil of the Deep
programme.desc: The Loch Ness Monster is rumored to have destroyed a German World War 1 boat, and using new technology a team uncovers if the legendary sea monster could have caused the wreck.

programme.title: Clash of the Dinosaurs: Generations
programme.desc: Many generations adapted the dinosaurs to the challenges of the planet.

programme.title: Clash of the Dinosaurs: Extreme Survivors
programme.desc: 120 million years of evolution made the body of the dinosaurs better able to adapt to the environment then the bodies of any mammals to date. Science examines the secrets of how they became such incredible survivors.

programme.title: Clash of the Dinosaurs: The Defenders
programme.desc: Plant eaters not predators are dominating the Cretaceous and their bodies can handle it.

programme.title: Clash of the Dinosaurs: Perfect Predators
programme.desc: The Cretaceous Period spawned the walking death machines, made of speed, eyesight and brainpower with razor sharp implements.

programme.title: Lost Beasts of the Ice Age
programme.desc: New discoveries in a mysterious Siberian cave could bring woolly mammoths and other long-dead Ice Age beasts back to life, and using the latest tech, experts race to unearth precious DNA from their mummified remains in a cutting-edge cloning experiment.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Wrath of the Minotaur
programme.desc: A new excavation at the mysterious home of the Minoans leads to a startling discovery about real-life origins of the Minotaur, and experts decode artifacts that point to bloody human sacrifices for the ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Kraken Awakens
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that a sea beast like the Kraken could have existed, and experts examine a strange monster that could give shocking answers into this underwater mystery.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: One Hot Summer
programme.desc: 14-year-old Christie Mullins is murdered in Clintonville, Ohio. The murder is unsolved for forty years until a young woman comes forward to identify her uncle as the killer. He is revealed to have a surprising connection to his victim.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: He's Back
programme.desc: When Natalie Purdie moves from New York City to Norfolk, Virginia, she quickly makes new friends both on and off her high school dance squad. But as Natalie's life revolves around dance, she has no idea a violent obsession revolves around her.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Nine Years in the Shadows
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, CA home in 1988, police investigate the strife and infidelity on both sides of her marriage. But it's a surprising witness who eventually leads police to her killer.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Fixation
programme.desc: Jealousy's a curse but it's never an excuse to kill.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Unusual Suspect
programme.desc: A popular Wisconsin funeral director and his intern are murdered in cold blood. The case stalls for two years before a criminal profiler takes a fresh look and sees only one viable suspect -- someone the police never considered.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Hell in Hawaii
programme.desc: A handyman who lives rent-free in the home of a generous friend grows increasingly paranoid about his neighbours. He endlessly films them and instigates fights until the conflict escalates out of control, culminating in an explosive act of violence.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: What If He Was Innocent?
programme.desc: Some say Cameron Todd Willingham was wrongfully convicted, and the court put an innocent man to death. But Stacy Kuykendall knew Todd better than anyone, and she's convinced that he was a monster who was guilty as charged and deserved to die.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Unusual Suspect
programme.desc: A popular Wisconsin funeral director and his intern are murdered in cold blood. The case stalls for two years before a criminal profiler takes a fresh look and sees only one viable suspect -- someone the police never considered.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Hell in Hawaii
programme.desc: A handyman who lives rent-free in the home of a generous friend grows increasingly paranoid about his neighbours. He endlessly films them and instigates fights until the conflict escalates out of control, culminating in an explosive act of violence.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: While I Was Gone
programme.desc: Michele Ward was always glad that her husband, Richard Daniel Starrett, didn't mind her frequent trips to visit her parents. She never guessed that he sent her away because his sick perversion was getting harder and harder to hide.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Friends Are Foes
programme.desc: Friendships can give us love and support, unless they turn toxic.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: History of Violence
programme.desc: 50-year-old Edwardyne Williams' body is discovered in the woods and at first it appears to be a random act of violence. But as police dig deeper, they discover that the killer is someone who has been harboring a grudge against her for years.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Murder On The Home Front
programme.desc: When 25 year old veteran Brandon Horst is found with a bullet through his head, it looks like the fallen hero has succumbed to PTSD. But when the case is revealed to be a homicide, police must untangle a vicious conspiracy that hits close to home.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath: Blood Jungle
programme.desc: In Maui, a mother reports her pregnant daughter missing to police. As the island launches mass searches into the jungle, the discoveries get more horrifying and the lies more complex. The trial takes months as the evil behind this tragedy is exposed.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Body in the Cornfield
programme.desc: Barbara Keim is juggling two ex-husbands and a rebellious teenage daughter with a questionable circle of friends. When Barbara goes missing, her sisters fear the worst.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Predator of Pleasant View
programme.desc: Suzy Goulart, 23, is just getting by like everybody else in the scrappy Pleasant View apartment complex, where little dramas between friends and lovers add up to Suzy's fiery murder.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Venus Guy Trap
programme.desc: Beautiful nursing student Taiana Matheny falls for rising rap star Terry Sellers. With Taiana as their irresistible bait, their hot and heavy drug-fueled romance turns their romantic getaway into a murderous crime spree.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Get Rich Quick
programme.desc: These women think their men are worth more dead than alive. A scorned Southern belle tries to cash in on her ex's life; a countess clings to her riches through violent means; and a mother of two trades her husband for another shot at the good life.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mom's Money
programme.desc: Most children value their mother's enduring love, but few are only concerned with a different kind of maternal support: money. These Deadly Women prove all they care about is ''Mom's Money''.

programme.title: Deadly Women: In the Family
programme.desc: Some killers don't go far to find their victims. Driven by revenge, greed and family 'honor,' these women turned on their own. When these Deadly Women struck, they kept it 'In the Family.'

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Since the Day I Was Born
programme.desc: A mother abandons three newborn babies over a five-year period. Now all grown-up one of these babies, Janet Barnicoat, is searching for clues to her biological family.

programme.title: Disappeared: A Bridge Too Far
programme.desc: A date night in Philadelphia becomes deeply disturbing when a couple disappears. Their families unite to find them, but as desperation grows, finger pointing puts them at odds. Soon, the FBI takes over the investigation that is riddled with speculation.

programme.title: Diabolical: Someone's Lying
programme.desc: On April 17, 2015, a Virginia hunter stumbles upon a grisly discovery in the woods: a woman with an execution style gun shot wound to the back of her head. As detectives begin their investigation, they uncover a twisted web of lies and crimes.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: New Year's Nightmare
programme.desc: New Year's Eve 2009, Mikarah Sanders is shot in a home invasion. Police search for the intruder by diving into her digital world, where they learn the killer has been under their noses all along, driven by rage to commit a shocking crime of passion.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.desc: Lou Ferrante is in Albuquerque, to meet one of the world’s fastest growing prison gangs – The Burqueños.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Camorra
programme.desc: Lou visits Naples, a place with one of the oldest, most powerful gangs in the world – The Camorra. A number of bodies have recently been found in the city, causing world headlines.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Reagan's KGB Agent
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell,' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet Spy war.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Escaping the Kill Room
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned Double Agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Alcatraz: Beyond the Rock

programme.title: America's Hidden Bunkers

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lakeside Lounging on Lake Gaston
programme.desc: Amber and Jon are looking for a getaway near their home in Raleigh, NC, and Lake Gaston fits the bill. With assistance from their broker, they find a house with a price that's as perfect as the location but the condition of the home is less than ideal.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Coastal Cottage in Hampton, Virginia
programme.desc: A couple that dreams of raising their two sons along the shores of Hampton, Virginia, finds a waterfront property in need of serious updating.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Vegas
programme.desc: Better bet it all on finding amazing food in Las Vegas as they know how to double down.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Closers
programme.desc: There's no better way to end a meal than with these delicious dishes. In New York City, Martha Stewart gushes over the most irresistible piece of lemon meringue she's ever had.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow
programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Rise And Dine
programme.desc: Wake up and get ready to dine on some of the country's best breakfast dishes starting with Martha Stewart's favorite biscuits and country ham found in Nashville. Scott Conant then brings a new take on French toast.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Glasgow
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the culinary scene of Glasgow, Scotland, which is just as diverse as the city's landscape. From macaroni pies to venison haggis, the whimsical curiosity of the people is reflected in the iconic dishes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Big Island
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Hawaii's Big Island to take in its laid-back cuisine. From ancient traditions like lau lau and opakapaka fish to new traditions like the loco moco and huli chicken, he dives deep into the island's food culture.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bay Area
programme.desc: California's East Bay area is a thriving multi-ethnic community. Andrew Zimmern highlights the culinary hot spots where Chinese Dim Sum, Indian Pani Puri, American Soul food and Mexican tacos are being served up in traditional style.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the boardwalk indulgences of the Jersey Shore. From sticky-sweet saltwater taffy, to slices of tomato pie and Italian subs, the Jersey Shore's culinary scene is a carnival for the taste buds.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: West Virginia
programme.desc: Andrew travels to West Virginia, where people are using methods both old and new to prepare wildlife that flourishes in the state's mountains and rivers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: St. Louis: Pig Snouts and Paddlefish
programme.desc: Andrew comes to St. Louis, a city where the food reflects the diversity of the neighbourhoods and the people who live there.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Grilled to Have You Here
programme.desc: The chefs are thrilled to enter the Fire Masters Arena and show the judges what they can do. The competitors make sure the judges eat their fruits and veggies in the Crossfire Round, and the Feast of Fire is a flame-kissed fiesta of flavor.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sizzling Southwest
programme.desc: Enchiladas, burritos, fajitas, ole! We're counting them down one by one, culminating in a Tex Mex Treat so stupendous, it's coming in at number one on the countdown.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Grand Rapids, MI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Grand Rapids, Michigan, where he takes on a five-pound tray loaded with chili dogs, French fries, beer-battered onion rings and a 20-ounce soda.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Richest Duck in the World!
programme.desc: Louie, Scrooge, and Owlson must escape from an unstoppable monster cursed to hunt down and destroy the richest duck in the world.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: The family rallies an army to defend against an invasion. As Della and the kids search the globe for reinforcements, Scrooge leads his ragtag troops against Lunaris’ forces.

programme.title: Movie: Malibu's Most Wanted
programme.desc: A wealthy father worries that his rap-obsessed, chronically-white son will ruin his chances of becoming California's next governor. In order to scare his boy white, he secures two Julliard-trained actors to kidnap him and deposit him in the 'hood.'

programme.title: Movie: Soul Plane
programme.desc: Last-minute passenger additions shake things up on an airline's maiden flight.

programme.title: Movie: The Wash
programme.desc: An uninspired man gets an assistant-manager job busting suds at the local car wash.

programme.title: Reba: Someone's at the Gyno With Reba
programme.desc: Reba discovers that Cheyenne and Barbra Jean share the same gynocologist.

programme.title: Reba: You Make Me Sick
programme.desc: Cheyenne hides morning sickness from Van, and Reba's neighbour won't let Jake sleep over.

programme.title: Movie: All Things Valentine
programme.desc: A blogger with a string of disappointing Valentine's Days is ready to give up on love when she meets Brenden, a handsome veterinarian. She finds out he blames his recent break-up on her blog and he is the one leaving her angry comments.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Dollywood
programme.desc: When a NYC event planner returns to Tennessee to plan the Christmas celebration at Dollywood, she's paired with the head of operations who thinks he can handle the party just fine on his own.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Engagement
programme.desc: Blanche announces that Harry has proposed leaving Rose worried about where she will live.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Guess Who's Coming to the Wedding?
programme.desc: Dorothy invites her ex-husband Stan to their daughter's wedding so she can get revenge.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose the Prude
programme.desc: Rose has qualms about sharing her stateroom on an upcoming cruise with a man she likes.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Transplant
programme.desc: Blanche has to make a life-altering decision when the sister she hates needs a kidney.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Triangle
programme.desc: A doctor Dorothy dates also gets Blanche's pulse racing, until he makes a pass at her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: On Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche's undisciplined 14-year-old grandson's visit gives new meaning to generation gap.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Competition
programme.desc: Sophia and Rose compete against Dorothy and Blanche in a bowling tournament.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Break-In
programme.desc: Terrified by a burglary, the girls explore means to protect themselves, including a dog.

programme.title: Frasier: Can't Buy Me Love
programme.desc: Frasier wins an evening with a model in an auction and Roz buys a football player.

programme.title: Frasier: You Can't Tell a Crook by His Cover
programme.desc: Martin invites three friends over for poker and challenges Frasier to guess which one of them did time in prison. When they discover that Daphne has agreed to go on a date with the ex-con, Frasier and Niles take it upon themselves to 'save' her.

programme.title: Frasier: The Show Where Lilith Comes Back
programme.desc: Frasier's ex-wife Lilith calls his show to disagree with the advice he has given a caller. When she arrives in Seattle, a conversation between Frasier and Lilith stirs up old feelings.

programme.title: Frasier: A Mid-Winter Night's Dream
programme.desc: Niles and Daphne get stuck at Niles' house during a snow storm while Maris is away.

programme.title: Frasier: And the Whimper Is...
programme.desc: Frasier and Roz attempt to improve their chance of winning a SeaBea by sending gifts to the jury members. Frasier soon regrets his actions when he learns that an eminent talk show host is retiring at the end of the year.

programme.title: Frasier: Give Him the Chair
programme.desc: After replacing Martin's favourite chair with a new one, Frasier is forced to appeal for the old chair's whereabouts on his show and finally locates it as a stage prop for a school play.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche and the Younger Man
programme.desc: Blanche dates her young aerobics instructor; Rose is overprotective of her mother.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Heart Attack
programme.desc: Sophia suffers an apparent heart attack and the girls nervously await the paramedics.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan's Return
programme.desc: Dorothy's ex-husband, Stan shows up to settle a piece of land they bought on their honeymoon. This leads to Dorothy and Stan spending the night together. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche plan a vacation that Sophia is not invited on.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle
programme.desc: Dorothy's sister, Gloria, comes to Miami for a visit and asks Sophia to come live with her in California. Meanwhile, Blanche is furious when Rose is cast as Lady Macbeth in a local play, and not her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Rose has been dating Dr. Jonathan Newman and begins to think their relationship is leading to the altar. However she begins to have second thoughts especially since he's a midget.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Was No Lady
programme.desc: Dorothy latest boyfriend, Glen, gives her a shock when he tells her he's married. She surprises herself when she finds herself sneaking around to be with him. Meanwhile, Blanche unloads her old car on Rose in order to buy a new one.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: In a Bed of Rose's
programme.desc: Late one evening, Rose brings a man home and they spend the night together. However, in the morning she finds that he has passed away. Even worse, she later discovers he was married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Truth Will Out
programme.desc: Rose is apprehensive about a visit from her daughter and granddaughter, since their reason for coming is to settle Rose's late-husband's will. Meanwhile, Blanche gets caught up in the tabloids of a society murder.

programme.title: Movie: A Dash of Love
programme.desc: When an aspiring chef lands an assistant job at her idol's restaurant, she's convinced her big break is just around the corner. After a rocky start, she befriends the handsome executive chef and they bond in the kitchen.

programme.title: Movie: Matching Hearts
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day nears, a matchmaker is tasked by her mentor to find a match for an entrepreneur who believes staying single is the key to success.

programme.title: Movie: Autumn Dreams
programme.desc: A young couple's spur of the moment marriage is immediately annulled by the bride's parents. Years later, they discover that a glitch in the paperwork means they are still husband and wife.

programme.title: Movie: Chasing Waterfalls
programme.desc: A photographer takes a trip to find a remote waterfall, along the way, she finds a handsome guide.

programme.title: The Office: The Inner Circle
programme.desc: Deangelo's true management style is finally revealed to the staff.

programme.title: The Office: Dwight K. Schrute, (Acting) Manager
programme.desc: Dwight takes over as acting manager and applies draconian tactics to the office. Meanwhile, Gabe tries to win Erin back.

programme.title: The Office: Search Committee
programme.desc: When the search begins for a new manager, Jim heads the search committee that interviews the candidates.

programme.title: The Office: Search Committee
programme.desc: When the search begins for a new manager, Jim heads the search committee that interviews the candidates.

programme.title: The Office: The List
programme.desc: The Dunder Mifflin staff accidentally discovers a list of their names in the notebook of the company's mysterious new CEO, Robert California, triggering a frenzy of speculation.

programme.title: The Office: The Incentive
programme.desc: After a motivational speech, Robert challenges the office to double their sales. After the new manager promises the unthinkable, everyone in the office suddenly gets motivated to sell. Pam finds an unlikely pregnancy friend.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Surprise Party
programme.desc: Johnny tries to arrange a surprise birthday party for Moira. Things backfire when she unwittingly takes over the planning of her own party.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Town for Sale
programme.desc: Johnny finds a potential buyer for the town. David and Alexis discover they may have become more attached to the town than they ever thought possible.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Finding David
programme.desc: The Roses search for their missing son, David, while Alexis takes her relationship with Mutt to the next level despite technically being engaged to Ted.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Family Dinner
programme.desc: Moira decides to cook dinner with the help of David. Johnny scopes out an office for his consulting business. And Alexis finally comes clean with Ted about their engagement.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Jazzagals
programme.desc: Moira attempts to join the town’s a cappella group. Alexis enjoys the heady first days of her latest relationship. And Johnny helps out at Bob’s Garage despite himself.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Estate Sale
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira go to an estate sale. Mutt surprises Alexis with a bike, while Roland asks David to help him shop for a special item.

programme.title: South Park: Raisins
programme.desc: After Wendy breaks up with Stan the boys take him to 'Raisins,' a local restaurant known for its great chicken wings and hot girls.

programme.title: South Park: Follow That Egg
programme.desc: After Mrs. Garrison realizes that she still has feelings for Mr. Slave, she finds out that Mr. Slave has moved on and found a man he will marry as soon as the same-sex bill passes. She decides to lead the fight against gay marriage to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Bass to Mouth
programme.desc: The kids' most scandalous secrets are being leaked on an outrageous new gossip website.

programme.title: South Park: A Scause for Applause
programme.desc: A serious doping scandal shakes everyone's faith in a beloved icon. Everyone who once supported the fallen hero is now cutting off their symbolic yellow wristbands.

programme.title: South Park: The Return of Chef
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman are thrilled to have their old friend back when the town is jolted by Chef's sudden reappearance. The boys soon notice that Chef is acting different and his strange behaviour begins to get him in serious trouble.

programme.title: South Park: W.T.F.
programme.desc: After attending their first WWE match, all the boys want to be professional wrestlers. When they decide the wrestling offered at school is lame, they create their own league, the WTF.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go
programme.desc: Things go horribly wrong when Cartman plans to propel himself into the future. South Park Elementary School is facing strong opposition to the topic of evolution being taught to the fourth graders, especially from Mr. Garrison who must teach it.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go XII
programme.desc: After freezing himself in an attempt to make his three-week wait for a Nintendo Wii pass quickly, Cartman lands himself over 500 years in the future. Stuck in a tumultuous place with warring factions and angry sea otters, Cartman fights to return home.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Butt and Pancake Head
programme.desc: One of Cartman's body parts becomes famous overnight and rivals the popularity of another superstar.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek vs. Craig
programme.desc: The boys instigate a fight between Tweek and Craig in shop class. Meanwhile, Mr. Adler, the shop teacher, is haunted by a recurring dream of his lost love.

programme.title: South Park: Terrance and Phillip in 'Not Without My Anus'
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip must travel to Iran to save Terrance's little daughter, Sally. While they are gone Saddam Hussein takes over Canada, leaving Terrance and Phillip to save the entire country.

programme.title: South Park: The Biggest Douche in the Universe
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: The Comedy Central Roast
programme.desc: A famous celebrity gets roasted by other comedians.

programme.desc: In order to get more women in government, Leslie and April handle a garbage route. Tom learns about basketball from Andy and Ben.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Emergency Response
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben organize a black tie gala to raise money for their park, but their plans are derailed when a city wide emergency response drill is called.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Leslie and Ben
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben have only two hours to complete a year-long project. Ron gets in trouble when his temper gets the better of him.

programme.title: The Office: Lotto
programme.desc: The warehouse guys win the lottery and quit, leaving the rest of the office to fantasize about what their lives would be like had they been the winners.

programme.title: The Office: Doomsday
programme.desc: Dwight tries to help the office's efficiency by installing a Doomsday device that will get them all fired if they make too many mistakes.

programme.title: The Office: Pam's Replacement

programme.title: The Office: Gettysburg
programme.desc: Andy takes the office on an inspiring trip to Gettysburg in order to motivate everyone.

programme.title: The Office: Mrs. California

programme.title: The Office: Trivia
programme.desc: When Oscar joins a trivia night contest, Andy tries to get the whole office involved. Dwight visits headquarters to explore other job opportunities.

programme.title: The Office: Pool Party
programme.desc: Robert decides to sell his mansion following his divorce and Kevin suggests an office pool party before the sale becomes official.

programme.title: The Office: Jury Duty

programme.title: The Office: Special Project
programme.desc: After Dwight gets assigned to a special project at Sabre headquarters in Tallahassee, he and Andy try to decide which Scranton employees get to go with him. Meanwhile, Pam returns from her maternity leave.

programme.title: The Office: Tallahassee
programme.desc: After Dwight and his team arrive in Tallahassee, Dwight competes with his coworkers to impress Sabre special projects president, Nellie Bertram.

programme.title: The Office: After Hours

programme.title: The Office: Test the Store
programme.desc: Dwight prepares a theatrical presentation to impress Nellie at the Sabre Store opening.

programme.title: The Office: The Last Day in Florida
programme.desc: Jim tries to save Dwight from being fired after Robert California reveals that he hates Nellie's business plan. Meanwhile, Andy learns that Erin isn't coming back to Scranton.

programme.title: The Office: Get the Girl
programme.desc: Andy makes a life-altering decision and drives across the country to pursue Erin. Meanwhile, Nellie shows up in Scranton and tries to claim the manager position.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: A Bad Seed Grows
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old girl is murdered and left in a cage, Jane and Maura must overcome the ethical dilemma of a psychiatrist and the stiff opposition of a fussy prosecutor to find the killer. Meanwhile, Jane has couch issues and Frankie sees UFOs.

programme.desc: When the jeweler to Boston's super cool and famous dies, our investigation leads us to a member of the Isles family we've never met. And that leads us to a secret Maura has been keeping for almost all of her life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Love Taps
programme.desc: The murder of a college student takes an odd turn when Jane and Maura discover he had 32 girlfriends. Uncovering who killed him and why leads them into a world of app developers, virtual boyfriends, and relationships built on lies.

programme.desc: In an exclusive interview, Drew Peterson's eldest son shares for the first time his memories of being raised by the man who he once admired above all others, his father.

programme.title: Movie: Kidnap
programme.desc: A single mother takes her son to an amusement park where he gets abducted. She goes to the police, but realizes that she doesn't have the time to wait for their help. Taking her son's safety into her own hands, she pursues the abductor relentlessly.

programme.title: Movie: The Gift
programme.desc: A couple runs into an old high school classmate of the husband's, who soon begins showing up uninvited at their house and sending mysterious gifts. The wife soon learns the horrifying secret of what happened between the men more than 20 years before.

programme.title: Movie: The Boy Next Door
programme.desc: A romance novelist is a suspect in a murder investigation of her neighbour, a college student living next door.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Down the Hill: The Delphi Murders: Part 1
programme.desc: The gruesome murder of two young girls rocked the small town of Delphi, Indiana. Four years later, despite audio and video of the alleged killer, the case remains open.

programme.title: Down the Hill: The Delphi Murders: Part 2
programme.desc: A brutal crime in the heart of America - two young girls murdered in plain sight. With a killer still on the loose, the community wants answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Black Hole
programme.desc: Investigators search for clues after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool turns a cold case around.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Portrait of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer terrorizes a small Texas town.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ambush
programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by cell phone forensics.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: After the devastating loss of teammate Jesse Goins, the crew struggles to mine with one man down. When Dave comes under fire from the team about the lack of access to the gold-rich Hummocks, he heads off for a do or die showdown with the local community.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Enter the Promised Land
programme.desc: The team finally gains access to the potential motherlode in the Hummocks. But as soon as the crew begins, Box Creek is hit by a huge snow storm and Jason makes an alarming discovery.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Winter's Warning

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Multiple Aftershocks

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Home for the Holidays?

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Divide and Conquer
