programme.desc: Ina Garten is fired up and sharing her advice for grilling and barbecuing like a pro. To start, hot coals work their magic on her Tuscan grilled Cornish hens, and she amps up the flavor on foolproof ribs with barbecue sauce.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Red, White and BBQ
programme.desc: The Kitchen is kicking off grilling season with a red, white and BBQ bash. Katie Lee whips up a fast-casual favourite, her Beastie Burger and Sunny Anderson makes a twist on a classic with her Grilled Chicken and Corn Pasta Salad.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Grilled Steak and Potatoes the Symon Way
programme.desc: Michael demonstrates simple techniques for grilling skirt steak to tender, medium-rare perfection. Then, he complements the steak with sticky barbecue onions fired up in a cast-iron skillet and cheesy hash brown potatoes.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Clambake on the Grill
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes a summertime seafood meal that's all about the prep and then letting the foil and grill do the work. He makes foil packets of Clams with Sausage and Peppers and, for dessert, Peaches with Mascarpone and Honey.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Take-Along
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shares delicious eats to take along to parties, get-togethers and cookouts, starting with a grilled potato salad and pinwheels three ways. Then she whips up everyone's favorite queso with grilled veggies and quick and easy fruit tarts.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dinner on the Grill
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes a Mexican-inspired family dinner on the grill, and Ladd pitches in with the cooking. The main course is a Drummond favorite, marinated Carne Asada, teamed up with skewers of juicy Chipotle Glazed Shrimp.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Cook-Out of Control!
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are amping up summer foods for an epic summer celebration. Their cookout menu includes triple decker burgers with roasted vegetables and cheese sauce, lobster roll panzanella and a grilled biscuit sundae with peaches and blueberries.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Steak Out
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off the summer grilling season with his fire pit steak and potatoes, finishing the steak by throwing it right onto the hot coals!.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Burger Bash
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges his talented chef friends to take a burger beyond the basic patty and bun. Antonia Lofaso combines sirloin and brisket with braised oxtail for an intensely meaty burger and whips orange juice for a crisp Garibaldi cocktail.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon: Backyard BBQ

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon: High Steaks

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon: Winging It
programme.desc: In their biggest competition yet, Bobby Flay and Michael Symon try to best each other in a regional barbecue challenge with a major advantage. The final four pitmasters are tasked with cooking a style of barbecue unique to an area of the country.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon: Going Whole Hog

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVII

programme.title: The Simpsons: G.I. D'oh

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Wife Aquatic

programme.title: The Simpsons: Revenge Is a Dish Best Served Three Times

programme.title: The Simpsons: Little Big Girl

programme.title: The Simpsons: Yokel Chords
programme.desc: When Lisa protests denying education to Cletus's children, Principal Skinner offers her a chance to tutor the kids herself. Lisa's plans to help are diverted when Krusty spots the kids during their field trip and decides to use them as a musical act.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homerazzi

programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a swam of millions of strange creatures invading a church, some wonder if it's evidence of a grisly secret buried in the ground below. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the threat this insect army poses.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Hell Island
programme.desc: Explore a ghost town that was once a dangerous industrial hellscape, a giant warship at the bottom of the ocean, and a top secret relic that could have changed the Cold War.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Alien Shrine
programme.desc: A strange alien shrine on a mountain peak, a bridge built in the Alaskan wilderness, and an American castle with a dangerous secret are mysterious deserted engineering projects and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Death Star
programme.desc: A Nazi fortress that could have changed history if it was finished, an underwater graveyard of unexpected American treasures, and a network of tunnels hiding a secret history of New York were abandoned for mysterious reasons, and experts investigate why.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Good, the Bad, and the Abandoned
programme.desc: The world's abandoned structures hold new evidence about the lives and deeds of history's greatest heroes and villains, and using the latest discoveries at these mysterious sites, experts count down the ten most significant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Doom of El Dorado
programme.desc: The haunting remnants of a settlement in the Nevada desert lies scattered with decaying machinery and remains trapped in a bizarre time-warp; experts uncover a forgotten mine where dreams of discovering a fortune were met with chaos and murder.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Mystery of the Alien Base
programme.desc: Abandoned hangers and bunkers populate a bizarre facility in the middle of nowhere, but among them are other structures whose purpose are oddly obscured; experts investigate a highly-classified military cover-up with extraterrestrial objectives.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: A Mother's Love
programme.desc: In the suburbs of Atlanta, Georgia, a pregnant mother and her fiancé are kidnapped on the night before their baby shower. When the fiancé's family receives ransom calls shortly after, there's no mistake that the couple's lives are hanging by a thread.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: The Sinner
programme.desc: When a young husband is shot dead in his Morris, Alabama home, police initially believe it's a robbery gone awry. But once the town rumor mill swirls to life, authorities uncover a dark secret hiding between the pews of the local Baptist church.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Following her divorce, Cristi buys a new home that needs work. Hoping handyman Curtis can fix it up, she ends up getting more than she bargained for. Curtis becomes fixated with Cristi and will stop at nothing until she becomes his.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Girl on the Billboard
programme.desc: After 15-year-old Jasmine Block mysteriously vanishes into thin air, her mother Sarah launches a crusade to find her before it's too late. But when the sickening truth behind Jasmine's disappearance surfaces, it leaves Sarah in shock.

programme.title: Dark Days of Summer
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Lisa Taylor goes missing on a warm summer night in Salisbury, Maryland, family and friends hope that she made a spur of the moment decision to take a road trip. But as days and weeks pass with no sign of her, they fear the worst.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Final Hours of Cayley Mandadi
programme.desc: '48 Hours' provides the first in-depth look into the death of a beloved college cheerleader and the case against her boyfriend.

programme.title: Body Cam: Hunted
programme.desc: In Texas police set a trap for a would-be killer. Officers put a plan into action, and Body Cam reveals a deadly plot. In Florida, a high-speed chase leads police into a dangerous swamp. But when a K9 locates the suspect, the arrest turns into a rescue.

programme.title: Dark Days of Summer
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Lisa Taylor goes missing on a warm summer night in Salisbury, Maryland, family and friends hope that she made a spur of the moment decision to take a road trip. But as days and weeks pass with no sign of her, they fear the worst.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sugar Land: Life or Death
programme.desc: A Texas man targeted by a hit man fights for the life of the person who ordered the murder; his son.

programme.title: Body Cam: Flight Risk
programme.desc: In Georgia, a suspected drug dealer won't go down without a fight. In Ohio, police fear for their lives when faced with an ambush from a hidden gunman. After a high-speed chase, a fleeing driver has one more surprise for Macomb County Deputies.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Bodies in the Bunker
programme.desc: When 16-year-old aspiring film producer Bohdi Potter and her boyfriend go missing, the grave truth behind their disappearance lies deep in the hollow corridors and dark caverns of an old, abandoned military bunker.

programme.title: Homicide City: The Professor's Wife
programme.desc: When Ellen Robb's husband finds her murdered in their quiet suburban Philadelphia home, evidence initially points to a robbery gone wrong. But as police dig deeper into the couple's life, they learn the motive may be far more sinister.

programme.title: Homicide City: Point Blank
programme.desc: The city of Philadelphia is in shock when hard-working mother Trish McDermott is gunned down on a Center City sidewalk. Detectives work around the clock to catch the killer, someone they soon discover is more dangerous than they ever could imagine.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What Happened to Abby?
programme.desc: A teen vanishes on her way home from school. Weeks later a puzzling letter from her arrives in the mail. This is the story of a desperate search for a girl hidden in plain sight, and her tale of bravery and resilience in the face of terror.

programme.title: American Monster: Body Type
programme.desc: Jason and Lindsey Lee are destined for each other; however, marriage can have its highs and lows. When the young couple decide to change their lifestyle to reignite the spark in the relationship, it comes with deadly consequences.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Murdered for Money
programme.desc: When a dismembered body is found on the edge of Phoenix, it turns out to be travelling jewellery salesman Jay Orbin. While he adored his exotic dancer wife Marjorie, turns out she had a few lovers on the side, giving police several suspects.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Silent Nightmare
programme.desc: Mathew Solomon can't find his wife Lisa after an argument on Christmas Eve. After a tearful press conference and city-wide search she is found strangled to death and abandoned in a garbage bag, and the true story behind her murder is anything but festive.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: What If He Was Innocent?
programme.desc: Some say Cameron Todd Willingham was wrongfully convicted, and the court put an innocent man to death. But Stacy Kuykendall knew Todd better than anyone, and she's convinced that he was a monster who was guilty as charged and deserved to die.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Is Rodney Reed Innocent?
programme.desc: A Texas woman is brutally raped and murdered, and the trial sparks a racially charged debate over whether an innocent man has been condemned to death. But as new evidence comes to light, it seems her family may never know who killed Stacey Stites.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Evidence Lost, Justice Found
programme.desc: A young woman riding her bicycle is forced off the road and savagely murdered. Police chase her killer for decades until an overlooked clue ultimately leads to justice.

programme.title: True Conviction: For the Love of Money
programme.desc: An Upstate New York cabby is shot dead in his car, and the entire area is dumbfounded as to who would kill a man known for his great generosity. A rapid-fire investigation leverages technology to uncover a treacherous plot hatched in a salacious affair.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Serial Killer in the Making
programme.desc: Beloved wife and cardiac nurse Lorie Kirkley goes missing from the safety of her own home in what appears to be a burglary gone wrong. When several strange clues are found, the entire small town of Valparaiso, Indiana, comes under suspicion.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Fear Travels Fast
programme.desc: Aurora, Indiana hadn't seen a murder in decades until Leigh Jennings was killed in her own home. Residents are horrified when the beloved mother and hairstylist is found dead. In a case where everyone liked the victim, anyone could be the killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Kind Sister
programme.desc: Elizabeth Baune was a pillar of her community until she was stabbed to death in her own home. The rural town of Payette, Idaho is horrified by the tragic death of a teacher, especially since Elizabeth's own good nature may have been behind her death.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Deviant Deeds
programme.desc: A man is hysterical when he finds his brother's girlfriend and roommate beaten with an iron and stabbed to death on the floor. The brothers appear devastated, but the discovery of her missing phone casts doubt on their alibis.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Shot in the Leg
programme.desc: When a friend is fired from a restaurant, Konh Chung Bounnam and his friends decide to rob it. The plan goes awry and three people are killed. His friends are caught but Bounnam stays free. He hides until his need for money gets the FBI's attention.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Country Legend's Tour Bus
programme.desc: Christopher Gay is in jail for petty theft and known for his ability to escape. But on top of this, Gay is known for his choice in getaway vehicles. This cross-country chase is hardly a joy ride, as the cops are resolute on capturing him for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Impersonate a Guard
programme.desc: Dennis Hope, a handsome and intelligent thief, pulls off a series of daring robberies and goes on the run while living a life of luxury. Commuting from Alabama to Memphis.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Boyfriend to Support
programme.desc: In jail for fraud, Steven Russell falls in love with inmate Philip Morris. When Morris is released, Russell is desperate to be reunited. He escapes from jail with elaborate cons. Once out, the two live a lavish life, supported by scams that alert the FBI.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Hide in a Swamp
programme.desc: Dominic Reddick flees prison and heads to Georgia. Someone calls the cops on him and he escapes to the woods. He eats donuts form the dumpster outside a shop, but to his surprise the cops are waiting inside.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation

programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases some of the best of coastal cuisine in a top 15 countdown of the most delicious dishes inspired by America's oceans, lakes and rivers. There are wasabi salmon burgers in Alaska, crab cakes by the Chesapeake Bay and more in between.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Feasts Over Fire in Hawaii
programme.desc: Roger's first visit to the 50th state promises big fires and big feasts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Seafood Feast
programme.desc: Brothers Vaughn and Gary Knowles take Roger to the docks for fresh lobsters and clams for a breathtaking seafood feast. The Nisqually Tribe teaches Roger ways of preparing seafood.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Wine Country Cookouts
programme.desc: California's wine country is the perfect place for an outdoor cookout. The weather is gorgeous, the wine is simply divine, and the food is down-right delicious. Roger has been invited to two parties: a pig roast in Paso Robles and a surf and turf grill.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger's in Southern California for two unbelievable backyard blowouts. Roger meets Chef Ben Ford in Tarzana.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smokin' Sides and Sweets
programme.desc: No cookout is complete without some outrageous side dishes and craveworthy desserts, so Roger Mooking is putting the main course aside to honor everything that tops off the best barbecue meals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs
programme.desc: Roger visits two Southern California barbeque joints that serve smoked meat specialties on weekends.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tort(illa) Reform
programme.desc: Alton Brown introduces the virtues of the flattest flatbreads and the magic of an ancient ingredient called maize.

programme.title: Good Eats: Oh My, Meat Pie
programme.desc: Alton Brown tells the tale of an ancestor's journey to the New World by way of a curious meat pie shop. He explores the origins and preparation of shepherd's pie and mincemeat.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Proof Is in the Pudding
programme.desc: Alton Brown breaks into the liquor cabinet, not to concoct a drink but to examine the uses of alcohol in food preparation.

programme.title: Good Eats: Grillus Domesticus
programme.desc: Learn to make the perfect grilled chicken.

programme.desc: Discover garden essentials, outdoor decor and live plants to create your best backyard.

programme.desc: Mavis is horrified by her dad's new Mavy-Wavy fashion wings.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Legend of Pumpkin Guts

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Brain Drain/ Hair Today, Gone Tomorrow

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Drop the Needle/ Really Gross Anatomy
programme.desc: Mavis agrees to teach Klaus to bat out if he shows her how to replace the needle on Aunt Lydia's gramophone. Dr. Gillman gets an education on medicine from Mavis and the crew, though no one really has much knowledge on the subject.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Fright Before Creepmas

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Exit Sandman/ Roadkill Trip
programme.desc: Mavis and the group rebuild Diane's chicken coop, but their efforts are interrupting the Sandman's sleeping patterns. His solution is to cast a spell on them. When Mavis and Uncle Gene learn that the Roadkill Grill is closing, they plan a road trip.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Top Wing/ Fried Mean Tomatoes
programme.desc: Mavis and Quasimodo host some cooking classes at the hotel, but things don't go quiet as planned. Wendy wants to join the aerial security team, the Night Warts, but tensions arise when Mavis makes the team instead.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Four Monsters and a Funeral/ Rainbow Doom
programme.desc: Mavis has to hold a mock funeral after fibbing to Death and saying her Uncle Gene is dead. Mavis beats the video game, Rainbow Doom, using a cursed code, but the curse brings the game to life.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Drac to the Future
programme.desc: The self-updating tome, The Monstroso Serioso, is on display at Hotel Transylvania. While looking at the book, Kitty Cartwright finds herself sucked into its pages. It's up to Mavis to retrieve Kitty by travelling into the past.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Gorytelling/ A Few Good Monsters
programme.desc: When Cornelius Shivers reveals that he's writing a book about the hotel, each member of the Dracula family hopes to outdo the others with their own story. After a family heirloom is destroyed, the children are considered the only suspects.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Mummyfest Destiny/ Bandages of Brothers
programme.desc: Pedro's amulet has the ability to stop time, ensuring he's always first up at the buffet. When Mavis attempts to use it, however, trouble ensues. Since Pedro and Hank aren't getting along, Mavis and Wendy suggest they look for new roommates.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Creepover Party/ Frankenstein and Son
programme.desc: Crabby’s first winning streak leads to a sponsorship deal… with Plunderman Industries? Later Ace creates a Scrammer using Sloane’s cherished childhood plaything… to disastrous results.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Fangceanera
programme.desc: Mavis is turning 115, so it's time for her Fangceanera. This vampire rite of passage means that she'll finally earn her Dracula cape. In order to do that, however, she must complete a dangerous mission.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Married to the Blob
programme.desc: Wendy's dad and Pedro's mom are getting married and Mavis has promised Hotel Transylvania will throw them the best wedding ever.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Portrait of Mavis As a Young Vampire/ Goo Crush
programme.desc: Mavis is so excited that she is finally getting her portrait hung in the Hall of Draculas. Wendy has never had a crush, so Mavis sets out to help her find one.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Freakerheads/ For Whom the Smell Tolls
programme.desc: Hank is obsessed with the latest fad, Freakerheads! Mavis smells like rainbows and puppy dog tails when she reaches the next level event in vampire afterlife.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Cries and Dolls/ Hypnosferatu
programme.desc: Mavis' dreams are haunted by a familiar foe. Mavis attempts to master the art of vampnosis.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Best Friends Furever/ Fantasy Vamp

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.desc: A former chef's assistant is being sued for a stolen recipe, and a mother files a lawsuit against a baker to recoup medical expenses.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Arbogast vs. Vess
programme.desc: A Kansas man claims he's not the father, but his ex-girlfriend accuses him of denying her two-year-old daughter because he's involved with one of her friends.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Owens/ Rowe vs. Raynes
programme.desc: He accepted her as his daughter when she was a child, but now she's in court to find out if her mother has been keeping the father's true identity a secret.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Lacheya is seeking repayment of a loan in the amount of $703 for a loan she received to bail out her ex and child’s father Rakiem. He claims he’s not liable for anything because he never asked Lacheya to bail him out.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A man is suing his mother and claims that after going into business together, she stole money from their account.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Being Out of Tune ' and 'Withdrawing Prematurely.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Breaking a Bridge.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: A/C Accident/ Stirring the Hornet's Nest
programme.desc: An air conditioner falls out of a window, causing damage; a young man is injured by hornets in a vacant lot.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Larry says that Austin and Nina owe him $5000 for unpaid rent and damages to a rental property. Nina and Austin say Larry volunteered to settle for $1500 and already has their $1800 security deposit.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Young Lovers Devastated After Results
programme.desc: Dontay wants to forgive his girlfriend Alexis for cheating, but suspects she's still up to no good. Plus, Audrey is accused of cheating by her fiancé Jordan, and she says he's the one cheating.

programme.title: Maury: Did My Husband Cheat and Have a Secret Love Child?
programme.desc: Lagwenda fears that the man she wants to marry her has been cheating, and her friend Rossie has evidence to prove it. Then, Jasmine believes that her husband cheated after the tragic death of their twins.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I Do or I Don't
programme.desc: Ethan is excited to propose to his girlfriend Brittany but she's reluctant to say yes because she cheated with his best friend Will. Christian wants the next level with Libby but she just wants fun. Quan thinks his secret could send his fiancee running.

programme.title: Maury: That's Not My Baby ... I'll Prove You Were Pregnant When We Met!
programme.desc: Melanee wants to prove to Darious and his mom Lenell he's the father of her baby. Brandon says he's not the father of Natasha's baby, saying she cheated. Nicole says Jenise was already pregnant when she Nicole's son, Bishop, and that he's not the father.

programme.title: Longhorn Film Showcase
programme.desc: Short student films from the Department of Radio, Television and Film are featured. From insightful narratives and documentaries to cutting-edge pieces, these films represent just a sampling of the award-winning work done by UT's film students.

programme.title: Longhorn Arts & Culture: Cactus Cafe: Teddy Glass
programme.desc: Guest speakers and cultural events at the University of Texas.

programme.desc: Four Motown legends speak on the history and influence of the music, decades of memories and the crucial role that Motown played in integrating America.

programme.title: Texas 4000

programme.desc: When the Heffernans receive an oil painting of themselves as an anniversary gift from Deacon and Kelly, they dislike the picture so much that they decide to stage a robbery rather than hang the painting in their home.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Life After Death
programme.desc: Caroline attends her former nanny's funeral, thinking the family will be honoured to have her, but she quickly finds out they have no idea who she is.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Raven-Symone, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Margaret Cho, and Howie Mandel.

programme.title: Black-ish: Super Rich Kids
programme.desc: Dre has always felt his older son was never like him, but when he finally meets Junior's cool friends, Dre is all in and happy that his son may have the opportunity for an actual social life.

programme.title: Black-ish: Andre From Marseille
programme.desc: When Zoey brings home her first 'serious' boyfriend, a boy from school also named Andre, Dre takes an instant dislike to him for many reasons that include the fact that he's white, from France and rather worldly for a kid.

programme.title: Charmed: O, The Tangled Web
programme.desc: Macy reels from an encounter with the Shea Group and Maggie uses her psych background to get to the bottom of it. Harry and Mel must detangle an ancient feud.

programme.title: Dynasty: Everybody Loves the Carringtons
programme.desc: Jeff and Alexis create havoc during Fallon and Liam's important interview, which spurs a 'brilliant idea' for Fallon. Culhane is given a high honour, and he turns to Adam and Kirby when major complications come to light.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Masseuse
programme.desc: Jerry yearns for a massage from his new girlfriend; Elaine worries about her boyfriend.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Big Salad
programme.desc: Elaine tries to track down a special mechanical pencil. George is upset that his girlfriend took credit for purchasing a big salad for Elaine. Jerry discovers that his girlfriend used to date Newman. Kramer helps an athlete flee police.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Sea Is a Harsh Mistress
programme.desc: Charlie tries surfing in order to impress a beautiful girl, with disastrous results. He later tells Alan that when his life was hanging in the balance, their deceased father came to him and made a request that Charlie is reluctant to fulfill.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Why We Gave Up Women
programme.desc: When Alan suffers a minor heart attack, Charlie's ghost pays a visit to his hospital bedside.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Pickleball
programme.desc: Beverly discovers Murray is actually a year younger than they knew so she plans a do-over at celebrating his 50th birthday, while Coach Mellor attempts to prepare non-athletic Adam for tryouts for pickleball.

programme.title: Mom: Curious George and the Big Red Nightmare

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Ping-pong
programme.desc: Vanessa tries to educate Eve on why she should be more on board with having a woman president. Meanwhile, after Ed mentions to Mike that he hasn't seen his own daughter for years, Mike and Mandy try to figure out what they have in common.
